runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Shifted in at start and made contact, sent forward to take the lead, kicked clear after passing 300M, ran on strongly to the line, easily scored, impressive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;起步時向內斜跑，與他駒互相觸碰，受催策上前領放。跑過三百米處後加速帶離對手。末段走勢強勁。從容勝出，贏得漂亮。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on rail, 3 lengths back, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 300M, finished off very strongly to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(1W1W) 自第一檔起步普通，居中間位置，落後三個馬位，走內欄。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。直路初未能望空。三百米處望空。末段衝刺凌厲，取得亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; Moderately away, raced prominently on the middle track, peaked 300M, weakened gradually final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;出閘普通，居前列，在跑道中央競跑。三百米處未能再增速。最後一百五十米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Began well, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader, kept on well to the line to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘迅速，落後領放馬兩個馬位。末段保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Slightly slow out, positioned 4 lengths behind the leader on the inside, same position on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 200M, made some progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘略為緩慢，落後領放馬四個馬位，走內疊。直路彎居相同位置。直路初未能望空，二百米處望空，其後略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Away with them, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間稍後位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後四個馬位。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Shifted out at start and made contact, raced towards rear on the stands' rail, made no progress final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;起步時向外斜跑，與他駒互相觸碰，居後列，走外欄。最後四百米毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Jumped only fairly, taken back to race at tail, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，留居包尾位置。入直路時落後約五個馬位，直路上未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped only fairly, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘僅屬一般，沿途居包尾位置。從未有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Away well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 50M, finished 3rd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先四分一個馬位，直路初保持佳勢。一百五十米處未能再增速，被超越。最後五十米逐漸轉弱，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; Shifted out at start, raced prominently on the stands' rail, hard ridden approaching 300M, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;起步時向外斜跑，居前列，走外欄。趨近三百米處時受力策。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Fast into stride, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the stands' rail, hard ridden approaching 300M, kept on well to take a place without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;展步迅速，落後領放馬兩個馬位，走外欄。趨近三百米處時受力策。保持佳勢，跑獲季軍，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W5W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the outside, very wide turning in, made good progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W5W) 自大外檔出閘後留後，居後列，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊，直路上追前頗多，取得第四名，未能威脅三甲馬匹。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 2-year-old gelding, by Hellbent from Ultraviolet, a daughter of Sebring. Horses by the same sire include Invincible Ibis and Sky Joy. This fellow was given three trials in Hong Kong for one placing. In the latest trial, he sat midfield and finished third under pressure, beaten by 2-1/2Ls, over 1000m on turf in Conghua on June 26. Prefer to take a watching brief to see how he shapes at his local debut.
formguide.comments_chi: 「不惜代價」(Hellbent)之後，在港同父馬包括「白鷺金剛」及「天賜喜」等駒，生母出自「識奔」(Sebring)。抵港後三次試閘一次上名。最近6月26日出試從化草地1000米，早段居中，末段力策下跑第三名，落後頭馬2.5個馬位。初出暫宜觀望。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Began only fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後四至五個馬位。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Mid-field, one paced under pressure, unable to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間位置。在催策下保持同速。未能展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Bumped out of stalls, raced in rear, switched top of home straight, unable to improve position.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 出閘時與對手互相碰撞，居後列。直路初轉換跑線。末段未能推進。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (4W5W) Dropped out from widest draw, still in last pair top of home straight, no impression.
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(4W5W) 自最外檔出閘後墮後。直路初仍居最後兩位，毫無表現。
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Sat midfield 3 wide with cover, made no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W2W) Tracked pace, pushed along 400m out, stuck to task but one paced.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 跟隨領放馬。四百米處受推策。持續力拼，但保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Out with rest, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, easy run to turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，落後領放馬兩個馬位，走內疊。直路彎前走勢輕鬆，直路早段保持佳勢。一百五十米處未能再增速，保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W3W) Jumped awkwardly and ridden quietly from the tail of the field, overraced early stages, severely checked to avoid an accident around the 900M, showed limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W3W) 出閘笨拙，居包尾位置，未受催策。早段搶口。約九百米處時大力勒避一宗意外。末段對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat box seat, kept on okay, nothing extra final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居包廂位置。保持不俗走勢。最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W) Settled in mid-field, unable to secure clear run until 300m out, ran on well to close on leaders but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W) 居中間位置。未能望空直至三百米處。末段以佳勢追近領先馬匹，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W6W) Held up very wide in last few without cover after beginning from a poor draw, travelling keenly and pulled closer very wide rounding home bend, one-paced in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W6W) 自第十三檔出閘後留後，居最後數位之內，走大外疊，沒有遮擋。跑來搶口。轉直路彎時追近，走大外疊。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat midfield 2 wide, raced keenly in the middle stages, closed off well only beaten less than 3L.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。中段搶口。衝刺良佳。僅以不足三個馬位之差落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Raced in touch with leaders, didn't settle, had to wait for run over 300m out, switched 200m out, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹，未能穩定走勢。三百米處須等待空位出現。二百米處轉換跑線。末段保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) Settled towards the rear, made minor progress.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 居後列。略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Raced in mid-field, rail position, angled out under pressure 200m out, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。二百米處在催策下向外移出，但速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W4W) Bounded on jumping and lost ground, in rear, still in last pair turning into home straight, left behind final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W4W) 躍出時向上跳躍及失地，居後列。轉入直路時仍居最後兩位內。最後三百米被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W5W) Settled worse than midfield, angled out at the Turn, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W5W) 居中間之後位置。直路彎向外移出。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W) Held up last from widest draw, still in last place top of home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W) 自大外檔出閘後留居包尾位置。直路初仍居包尾位置。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Fast into stride, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 展步迅速，居中間位置，走外疊。入直路時落後約四個馬位。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W3W) Shifted in at start and bumped, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W3W) 起步時向內斜跑，被碰撞。沿途居後列。從未有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W5W) Mid-field, wide on bend, unable to quicken under pressure, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W5W) 居中間位置，直路彎走外疊。在催策下未能增速。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W3W3W) Sat on pace, raced wide, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W3W3W) 居前列，走外疊。對催策毫無反應。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W1W) Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to take a place, nearest finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上追前甚多，跑獲季軍。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W3W4W) Sat at the rear 3 wide, closed off okay from the rear. (Barrier manners unacceptable, must BT)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W3W4W) 居後列，走第三疊。末段自後列衝刺尚可。（閘廂行為難以接受。必須試閘及格。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W4W) Recovered from slow start to race in mid-field, race keenly throughout, driven 400m out, no extra final 200m.
(Blood in trachea and roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W4W) 出閘緩慢，恢復走勢後居中間位置。沿途搶口。四百米處受催策。最後二百米再無餘力。
（氣管有血及再次患有喘鳴症。）
runnerrecords.healthissue_chi: （氣管有血及再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W4W) Stood flat-footed at start and lost ground, caught up to main body of runners after 700m, widest into home straight, stayed on for pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W4W) 開閘時四蹄滯立，因而失地。過了七百米處後追上主馬群。入直路時走最外疊。在催策下保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) In rear after slow start, keen after checked early on, had to wait for a run between 400m out and 250m out, never a threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘緩慢，居後列。早段勒避後搶口。四百米處至二百五十米處之間須等待空位出現。從未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (3W5W) Jumped awkwardly and lost balance at the start. Sat at the very back 2 wide, never a factor. (See incident report.)
(Mucus in trachea and roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(3W5W) 出閘笨拙，起步時失去平衡。遙居包尾位置，走第二疊。從未有力一爭。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有痰及再次患有喘鳴症。）
runnerrecords.healthissue_chi: （氣管有痰及再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Led all the way on rail to win.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 沿欄一放到底勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Tracked leaders, good headway on bend, ridden top of home straight to challenge leader, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎以佳勢上前。直路初在催策下挑戰領放馬。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Ridden hard to lead, slightly weakened passing 200M
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 在力策下領放。跑過二百米處時略為轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Raced in touch with leaders, unable to secure clear run until 200m out, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹。未能望空直至二百米處。保持走勢，但從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W2W2W) Pressed leader, quickened early in home straight to lead, weakened final 100m and headed close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W2W2W) 追迫領放馬。直路早段加速上前取得領先。最後一百米轉弱，接近終點時被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Waited with towards rear, dropped to last place top of home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居後列，留力候上。直路初墮退至包尾位置。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Raced in rear after slowly away, had to wait for run turning into home straight, ran on strongly final 200m to lead close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘緩慢，居後列。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。最後二百米走勢強勁，接近終點時取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Dropped out from wide draw, had to wait for run turning into home straight, eased once well held from 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。自二百米處起在遙遙落後時隨即收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Settled midfield on the rail, unable to quickened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。末段未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Jumped awkwardly, taken back to race 4 lengths behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, made little progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，留後，落後領放馬四個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat outside the leader, raced keenly in the early stages, gave ground quickly entering the Straight (Unacceptable Performance, Must BT).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居領放馬外側，早段搶口。入直路時迅速墮退。（表現難以接受。必須試閘及格。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W) Tracked leaders against rail, moved smoothly into contention 500m out, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out and weakened quickly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。五百米處順勢上前挑戰。自四百米處起在催策下未能加速。末段迅速轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Raced prominently, keen, weakened over 300m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 居前列，搶口。三百米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Away well, raced better than midfield, 2-1/2L back at 400M, peaked on run 250M, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;出閘迅速，居中間之前位置。四百米處落後兩個半馬位。二百五十米處未能再增速。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Sat on pace, gave ground gradually inside 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 居前列。最後三百米逐漸墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W3W) Began well, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, similar position on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W3W) 出閘迅速，落後約一個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Settled midfield on the rail, saved grounds in the turn, limited response when asked. (See incident report.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。受催策時反應一般。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Sat just off pace, one pace to the line. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 居領放馬稍後位置。保持同速至終點。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) From wide draw switched off to race in last 8-9Ls back, proved difficult to ride out when hung in in the home straight, failed to quicken and only ran past a couple of beaten horses.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 自大外檔出閘，留居包尾位置，落後八至九個馬位。直路上內閃之際難以被力策。末段未能加速，僅能超越兩匹已洩氣的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (3W4W) Settled behind midfield, switched out making the Turn, made good progress from the back, battled to the finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(3W4W) 居中間之後位置。轉直路彎時向外移出。其後自後列追前甚多，力拼至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the stands' side, made no impression final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;起步時發生碰撞，居中間之後位置，靠近外欄競跑。最後四百米毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2WNIL) Jumped only fairly, sat rear, pulled up near 900M (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2WNIL) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列。接近九百米處時收停。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, pushed along final bend to chase leaders, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。直路彎受推策以追趕領先馬匹，但速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W) Began only fairly and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般及發生觸碰，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初對催策反應平平。最後一百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Held up last, still in rear top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 留居包尾位置。直路初仍居後列。速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Made contact at start, raced 3 wide towards rear, 2 wide on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared near 200M, made some progress thereafter until blocked final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 起步時發生觸碰，居後列，走第三疊。直路彎走第二疊。直路初未能望空。接近二百米處時望空。其後略為追前，最後五十米受阻。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Mid-field, pushed along halfway, dropped towards rear 300m out, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。半程時受推策。三百米處墮居後列，毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Raced three wide in touch, under pressure early home straight but soon gave ground final 300m, well beaten.
(Approaching the 300 Metres jockey dropped the whip.)
runnerrecords.incident_eng: (Approaching the 300 Metres jockey dropped the whip.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 居啣接位置，走第三疊。直路初受催策，但最後三百米瞬即墮退。所負頗遠。
（趨近三百米處時，騎師跌掉馬鞭。）
runnerrecords.incident_chi: （趨近三百米處時，騎師跌掉馬鞭。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Mid division, under pressure 600m out, switched wide for clear run 400m out, short-lived effort 200m out, unable to sustain.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置。六百米處受催策。四百米處移出外疊以望空。二百米處一度發力，其後無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W1W1W1W) Began awkwardly and made contact, sent forward to take the early lead, headed 1100M, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W1W1W1W) 出閘笨拙，與對手互相觸碰，早段受催策上前，取得領先。千一米處被超越。中段落後領放馬一至兩個馬位。直路初未能再增速。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W3W) Waited with towards rear, pushed along widest into home straight, stayed on but never going pace to challenge leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 居後列，留力候上。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。保持走勢，但從未能加速以挑戰領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Ridden along from stalls to track leaders, unable to pick up for pressure from 500m out, faded final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘後受催策以跟隨領先馬匹。自五百米處起受催策，未能加速。最後二百米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W) Dropped out from wide draw, still in last place top of home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。直路初仍居包尾位置。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (5W5W) Widest throughout without cover, struggled to hold position on bend, lost touch final 200m, well beaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(5W5W) 沿途走最外疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎難以保持位置。最後二百米被拋離，洩氣潰敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Away well, raced in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間位置，落後約三個馬位。直路初未能再增速。其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (1W2W) Rail position in mid-field, angled off rail 700m out, ran on well in home straight, lost out only narrowly in tight finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(1W2W) 居中間位置，走內欄。七百米處移離內欄。直路上以佳勢上前。在多駒幾乎齊過終點下僅以短距離之差落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Dropped out from wide draw, had to wait for run turning into home straight, bumped 250m out, never a factor.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。二百五十米處發生碰撞。從未有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run until approaching final 100M, finished off well to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 起步時與對手互相碰撞，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。未能望空直至趨近一百米處。衝刺良佳，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Rail position in mid-field, under pressure 700m out, strong run final 400m to lead 75m out, on top from there.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 居中間位置，走內欄。七百米處受催策。最後四百米走勢強勁。七十五米處取得領先，其後保持領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, same position on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路彎居相同位置。直路早段略為追前，一百五十米處未能再增速，最後五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W2W) Bumped out of stalls, raced in touch with leaders, keen throughout, driven 500m out, unable to quicken, faded final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W2W) 出閘時發生碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹。沿途搶口。五百米處受催策。未能加速，最後二百米收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W4W) Settled in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide final bend but briefly short of room, unable to quicken.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W4W) 居中間之後位置。直路彎受推策，走外疊，但一度空位不足。未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Bumped out of stalls, held up last, ridden along and outpaced middle stages, left behind in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘時被碰撞，留居包尾位置。中段受催策，但未能跟上步速。直路上被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Average to begin, raced 2 wide behind midfield, found rail approaching 700M, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘普通，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。趨近七百米處時移入內欄。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W4W4W) Three wide in mid-field without cover, struggled to hold position and taken widest on bend, eased once well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W4W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎難以保持位置，移出最外疊。遙遙落後時收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W4W) Out with rest, positioned 2 wide better than midfield, angled out approaching 650M, 3 wide turning in, showed good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to hold off the challengers late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W4W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。趨近六百五十米處時向外移出。入直路時走第三疊。直路上對催策反應良佳。一百五十米處帶頭。末段保持佳勢，力拒對手挑戰勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W5W) Slowly into stride and shuffled back, detached and pushed along widest 500m out, late headway.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W5W) 展步緩慢，墮後。被拋離，五百米處受推策，走最外疊。末段追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W5W) Settled midfield, lay in in the Home Straight, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W5W) 居中間位置。直路上內閃，走勢平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Given a waiting ride near last, over 7Ls off the pace rounding home turn, dropped to last 600M then switched to outside of track in the home straight. Made some progress without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居接近包尾位置，留力待上。轉直路彎時落後領放馬逾七個馬位。六百米處墮居包尾位置。直路上移至大外疊，略為追前，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Raced 3 wide in 6th position early. Kept on evenly in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 早段走三疊第六位。直路上維持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Dropped out from wide draw, still in rear top of home straight, bumped 250m out, lost touch final 250m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。直路初仍居後列。二百五十米處發生碰撞。最後二百五十米被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Prominent, struggled to hold position on bend, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居前列。直路彎難以保持位置。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Began smartly, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened and eased thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間稍後位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初未能再增速。其後轉弱及收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W2W) Began well, tracked leaders, 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W2W) 出閘迅速，跟隨領先馬匹，走第二疊。入直路時落後約兩個馬位。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Pressed forward from a poor draw to lead ploughing a lone furrow down the back straight, crossed for rails run onto home bend and led the field until narrowly headed into straight, folded up quickly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘，受催策上前領放。對面直路上單騎領放。開始轉直路彎時切入內欄。保持領先，直至入直路時被超越，落後短距離。迅速力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W) Shifted out at start and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W) 起步時向外斜跑及發生觸碰。居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段保持佳勢，最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Dropped in from wide draw, keen mid-race, pushed along over 500m out, no response to pressure, eased when well held 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘後移入內疊。中段搶口。五百米處受推策。對催策毫無反應，二百米處落後甚遠時收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Tracked leaders, switched to chase leaders 600m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。六百米處轉換跑線以追趕領先馬匹。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (4W2W2W3W) Sat worse than midfield 2 wide, made minor headway in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(4W2W2W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W3W) Settled midfield one off, showed some progress final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W1W4W) Made contact with the right side of its starting gate on jumping, taken back to race at rear on the inside, angled out 500M, 9 lengths back turning in, made some headway in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W1W4W) 躍出時觸碰閘廂右側，留居後列，走內疊。五百米處向外移出。入直路時落後九個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W4W) Sat midfield 2 wide, weakened in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。直路上轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Settled worse than midfield, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W2W2W) Sat last, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W2W2W) 居包尾位置。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Taken back towards rear from the widest draw, forced to check about 700M out, kept on at the one pace without quickening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 自大外檔出閘後留居後列。約七百米處被迫勒避。其後保持同速，未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Made contact shortly after start, taken back to race behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，留居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能再增速。最後三百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Shifted in at start and bumped, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 起步時向內斜跑，發生碰撞，居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, keen middle stages, ran green, never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。中段搶口，走勢稚嫩。從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W3W) Tracked pace out wide without cover, tended to hang right and dropped away quickly in home straight, soon well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路上傾向內閃，迅速墮退。瞬即落後頗遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Ran green in mid-field, stayed on late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居中間位置，走勢稚嫩。末段保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Began well, raced in 3rd, a length or so back, saved ground on turn, showed some response early in straight, peaked on run 100M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W1W1W) 出閘迅速，居第三位，落後約一個馬位。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初對催策略有反應。一百米處未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W4W) Settled in mid-field, under pressure 600m out, lacked pace to challenge, eased when detached 150m out.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置。六百米處受催策，速度不足以展開挑戰。一百五十米處被拋離之際收慢。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, well placed into home straight, strong run to lead close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。入直路時居好位。衝刺強勁，接近終點時取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Began well, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide on turn, finished off well, just missed out on 2nd in a photo.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走第二疊。衝刺良佳，在電眼判決下僅失亞席。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (4W3W3W) Three wide in rear of mid-field, ridden final bend to hold position, lost touch final 200m.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(4W3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。直路彎在催策下保持位置。最後二百米被拋離。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (3W5W) Away well, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Respiratory condition.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(3W5W) 出閘迅速，居中間稍前位置，走第三疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路初未能再增速。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（異常呼吸狀況。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Away well, positioned 1 out 1 back, there to turn, bumped near 350M, finished off strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 出閘迅速，落後一個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。接近三百五十米處時被碰撞。末段衝刺強勁，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, blocked off when going for run 600m out, weakened and gave ground final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。六百米處在取位時受困。最後二百米轉弱及墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Pressed leader against rail, quickened early in home straight to lead 300m out, margin reduced closing stages but always doing enough.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 追迫領放馬，走內欄。直路早段加速，三百米處取得領先。末段領先距離收窄，但一直保持佳勢，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Across to press leader, quickened early to lead top of home straight, headed by winner 75m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 切入追迫領放馬。直路初率先加速，取得領先。七十五米處被頭馬超越。末段持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 2-1/2L back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 起步後不久與對手互相碰撞，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後兩個半馬位。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked approaching 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段保持佳勢，趨近一百五十米處時未能再增速。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W3W) Jumped awkwardly, raced 2 wide better than midfield, carried out 450M, very wide turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W3W) 出閘笨拙，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。四百五十米處向外移出。入直路時走大外疊。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Tracked leader 2 wide, stayed on ok in the early straight, gave ground in the last furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領放馬，走第二疊。直路早段走勢尚可。最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Crossed gingerly from a wide barrier to share 3L 6th 2-wide onto first bend, gained steadily to within 2L of pace over 700M out, unable to make any further impression in the run to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘，逐漸切入。開始轉首個彎位時並居第六位，落後三個馬位，走第二疊。穩步上前，七百米處落後領放馬不逾兩個馬位。末段未能進一步追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Three wide in rear of mid-field, taken wider 750m out, unable to get on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。七百五十米處被帶出更外疊。未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W3W) Settled in front of midfield, raced very wide until 600M, gave ground passing 350M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W3W) 居中間之前位置。六百米處前走大外疊。跑過三百五十米處時墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W2W) Began awkwardly and made contact, raced in midfield on the inside, travelled keenly in the middle stages, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W2W) 出閘笨拙，與對手互相觸碰，居中間位置，走內疊。中段搶口。入直路時落後兩至三個馬位。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Moderately away, positioned 2 lengths behind the leader on the middle track, hard ridden from 400M but showed no response, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘普通，落後領放馬兩個馬位，在跑道中央競跑。自四百米處起受力策，但毫無反應。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Settled behind midfield, caught wide and without cover, weakened in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路上轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W) Settled in midfield on rail some 5L off the pace, tight behind runners early in home straight and forced to steady at around the 150M, made no further impression closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W) 居中間位置，落後領放馬約五個馬位，走內欄。直路初在馬匹之後受緊迫。約一百五十米處被迫收慢。末段再無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Raced in touch with leaders, taken wider 600m out, briefly hampered 400m out, no extra final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹。六百米處被帶出較外疊。四百米處一度受阻礙。最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W) Sat handy, raced wide, one pace to the line (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W) 居前列，走外疊。末段保持同速。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W3W) Began only fairly and made contact, raced 2 wide towards rear, 6 lengths or so back turning in, ran on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，與對手互相觸碰，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後約六個馬位。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Slightly slow out and made contact shortly after start, positioned a length or so back, 2 away from the stands' rail, no clear run until approaching final 150M, made minor progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;出閘稍慢，其後不久與對手互相觸碰，落後約一個馬位，走外欄第三疊。未能望空直至趨近一百五十米處。其後略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W2W) Jumped only fairly, settled worse than midfield, made steady progress under whip.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置。在鞭策下穩步追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Jumped only fairly, sat rear, traveled greenly, not much impression made.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列。走勢稚嫩。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W) Jumped awkwardly losing considerable ground, gradually recovered along the rail to last few, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, faded under pressure inside final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘笨拙，失地甚多。逐漸恢復走勢，居最後數位之內，走內欄。入直路時走內疊節省腳程。最後一百五十米在催策下力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W2W) Jumped with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, 3/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居第二位，走第二疊。入直路時落後四分三個馬位。直路初未能再增速。最後一百五十米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Crowded start, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, peaked on run 500M, weakened early in straight when hard run took toll.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 起步時受擠迫，居中間稍前位置，走第三疊。五百米處未能再增速。耗力太多，直路初轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Prominent early, tracking leaders halfway, struggling to hold position final bend, soon weakened.
(Sustained a small abrasion to its right front leg.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Sustained a small abrasion to its right front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(3W2W2W) 早段居前列，半程時跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎難以保持位置，瞬即轉弱。
（右前腿輕微擦傷。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Shifted out and heavily bumped out of stalls, disputed lead 700m out, ridden top of home straight, dropped away quickly final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘時向外斜跑及與對手互相大力碰撞。七百米處爭奪領先。直路初受催策。最後二百米迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Sent forward to lead, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 受催策上前，帶頭。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W1W) Ridden along to lead on the rail, weakened in the early straight, eased in the 200M. (Unacceptable performance, must trial.) (See incident report.)
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W1W) 在催策下取得領先，走內欄。直路早段轉弱。二百米處收慢。（表現難以接受，必須試閘及格。）（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat on pace 2 wide, angled out in the early straight, limited response in the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 跟前競跑，走第二疊。直路早段向外移出。直路上對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Settled in mid-field, taken wider 500m out, ridden top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置。五百米處被帶出較外疊。直路初受催策，未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W) Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the inside, 6-1/2L back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W) 自第十二檔出閘，留居後列，走內疊。入直路時落後六個半馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, ridden along to hold position 700m out, good headway up rail final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。七百米處受催策以保持位置。最後二百米沿欄追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Lacked early pace and had to settle further back in the field along the outside fence, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;早段欠缺前速，居後列，走外欄。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Tracked pace, challenged 200m out, soon hung right, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 跟隨領放馬。二百米處展開挑戰。瞬即內閃。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Sat behind midfield on the rail, saved ground in the home turn, lay out near 150M, stay on ok.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。接近一百五十米處時外閃，走勢尚可。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Jumped with them, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段略為追前。最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, well placed into home straight but dropped away quickly, well beaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。入直路時居好位，但迅速墮退。末段洩氣潰敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Mid-field towards centre of course, under pressure 400m out, never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;居中間位置，靠近跑道中央競跑。四百米處受催策。從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W2W) Slightly slow out, raced 2 wide towards rear, 8-1/2L back turning in, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W2W) 出閘稍慢，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後八個半馬位。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Wide throughout, tracked pace, weakened quickly home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 跟隨領放馬，沿途走外疊。直路上迅速轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Made contact at start, raced towards rear on the middle track, made no progress final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;起步時發生觸碰。居後列，在跑道中央競跑。最後四百米毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Sat towards rear, traveled okay, one pace to the finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 居後列，走勢尚可。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (5W6W) Held up from wide draw, no impression under pressure home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(5W6W) 自外檔出閘後留後。直路上受催策，但毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Commenced well, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 6 lengths or so back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間稍後位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後約六個馬位。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W2W) Began well from a tricky gate, raced prominently on the outside, 1/4L back turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Respiratory condition.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W2W) 自第九檔出閘迅速，居前列，走外疊。入直路時落後四分一個馬位。直路早段保持佳勢，二百米處未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（有呼吸毛病。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W1W) Sat last 2 wide, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W1W) 居包尾位置，走第二疊。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W2W1W) Settled in worse than midfield, saved ground turning in for home but dropped out tamely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W2W1W) 居中間之後位置。轉入直路時走內疊節省腳程，但乏力墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Sat at the rear 2 wide, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 居後列，走第二疊。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat last, picked off a couple weakened rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居包尾位置。末段超越兩匹已轉弱的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Settled down near last, raced greenly throughout the race and failed to finish off in the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居接近包尾位置，沿途走勢稚嫩。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Raced wide without cover, chased along early, driven along 450m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 早段追趕領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。四百五十米處受催策。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began smartly from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。直路彎前走勢暢順。直路上保持佳勢，但最後一百米不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began smartly, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually close home, just stayed on to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前，取得領先。入直路時領先一又四分一個馬位。直路初保持佳勢。一百五十米處未能再增速，被超越。接近終點時逐漸轉弱，僅能保持走勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Began smartly from gate 11, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, kept on well in straight to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 自第十一檔出閘迅速，居前列，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Ridden along from stalls to lead, quickened early in home straight and kicked two lengths away 100m out, cosy winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘後受催策，取得領先。直路早段加速，一百米處帶離兩個馬位。從容取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Slightly slow out, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly, lost 2nd on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘稍慢，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先四分一個馬位。直路早段保持佳勢，一百五十米處未能再增速及被超越。末段保持穩勢，過終點時失去亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Raced prominently, good headway to challenge leader on bend, pushed ahead over 200m out, held on in tight finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居前列。直路彎以佳勢上前挑戰領放馬。二百米處在推策下上前領先，在多駒幾乎齊過終點下險勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W) Showed good speed to lead, kicked 350m out, headed by winner 150m out, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W) 展現甚快前速領放。三百五十米處加速。一百五十米處被頭馬超越。最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Tracked leaders out wide, travelled smoothly to 350m out, ran on well final 200m to close on leader but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走外疊。三百五十米處前走勢暢順。最後二百米以佳勢上前，追近領放馬，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Chased leader against rail, switched to challenge leader on bend, ran on well but headed by winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 追趕領放馬，走內欄。直路彎轉換跑線以挑戰領放馬。以佳勢上前，但接近終點時被頭馬超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Began well, raced 2 wide, a length or so back, same position on turn, hard ridden after passing 250M, took the lead 150M, kept on strongly to the line, won by 3 lengths.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，落後約一個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎居相同位置。跑過二百五十米處後受力策。一百五十米處取得領先。保持勁勢至終點，以三個馬位之先勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Tracked leaders against rail, well placed into home straight, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。入直路時居好位。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Pressed leader, joined leader top of home straight, pressed on 300m out, stayed on at the one pace.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 追逼領放馬。直路初追上領放馬，三百米處受催策，其後保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Across from wide draw to lead, two lengths clear 800m out, margin reduced 500m out and quickly lost place early in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自外檔出閘後切入領放。八百米處領先兩個馬位。五百米處領先距離收窄，但直路早段迅速失位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W2W) Tracked leader, pushed along to challenge leader top of home straight, gave ground final 150m.
(Blood in trachea and roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領放馬。直路初受推策，挑戰領放馬。最後一百五十米墮退。
（氣管有血及再次患有喘鳴症。）
runnerrecords.healthissue_chi: （氣管有血及再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W2W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, pushed along 500m out, briefly hampered 200m out, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W2W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。五百米處受推策。二百米處一度受阻礙。速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W) Bumped leaving stalls, tracked pace out wide without cover, pushed along to chase leader 500m out, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W) 出閘時發生碰撞，跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。五百米處受推策以追趕領放馬。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Tracked leaders, pushed along 500m out, lacked pace to challenge, no extra final 200m.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。五百米處受推策。未能增速以展開挑戰。最後二百米再無餘力。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Away well, raced 2 wide, 1-1/2L back, there to turn, hit the front 200M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 75M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，落後一個半馬位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。二百米處取得領先。保持佳勢，但最後七十五米未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W5W) Broke well from a poor draw, well there before taken back to joint 5th 2-wide near midfield, shifted wider turning in for home, ran on under pressure to hit the front over 100M despite hanging and a difficult ride.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W5W) 自外檔出閘迅速，居好位，其後留居接近中間位置，並列第五位，走第二疊。轉入直路時移出較外疊。雖然內閃及難以策騎，但在催策下上前，一百米處取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Up with early pace, tracked leaders in 3rd entering home turn, moved up to challenge passing 500M, fought for the lead early straight but couldn't sustain run passing 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 早段跟上步速。進入直路彎時居第三位，跟隨領先馬匹。跑過五百米處時上前展開挑戰。直路早段爭奪領先，但跑過二百米處時無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Dropped out from widest draw, had to wait for run early in home straight, no extra final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後。直路早段須等待空位出現。最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Bumped shortly after leaving stalls, rear of mid-field, driven 500m out, briefly tight for room 300m out, unable to improve position.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 出閘後不久被碰撞，居中間之後位置。五百米處受催策。三百米處一度受緊迫。末段未能推進。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (1W1W) Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 200M, finished off strongly to snatch victory near the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(1W1W) 自第九檔出閘，留居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能望空。二百米處望空。衝刺強勁，接近終點時取得勝利。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W4W) Jumped awkwardly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider from 600M, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W4W) 出閘笨拙，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。自六百米處起走較外疊。入直路時落後四至五個馬位。直路上毫無進展。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, challenged up rail early in home straight, stayed on but no match for leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路初沿欄展開挑戰。保持走勢，但不敵領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Soon dropped to last, checked 750M out, saved ground on rail turning in for home, producing good late impression inside final 200M when steadied about 70M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 瞬即墮居包尾位置。七百五十米處勒避。轉入直路時走內欄節省腳程。最後二百米追前甚多。約七十米處收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Crowded at start, settled in rear of mid-field, ridden top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 起步時受擠迫，居中間之後位置。直路初受催策，但未能增速以展開挑戰，從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Taken back from gate 12, raced 2 wide at rear, angled out 450M, 5 lengths or so back turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 自第十二檔出閘，留居後列，走第二疊。四百五十米處向外移出。入直路時落後約五個馬位。直路上追前甚多，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Shifted in and bumped out of stalls, tracked leaders out wide, stayed in contention until no extra final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 出閘時向內斜跑及被碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹，走外疊。保持爭逐機會，直至最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled in rear of mid-field, forced to steady on heels 800m out, switched inside for clear run 300m out, ran on well to close on leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置。八百米處被迫收慢避開他駒後蹄。三百米處移入內疊以望空。以佳勢上前，追近領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, well placed into home straight, ran on well to lead 200m out, pressed by runner-up but stayed on well to hold on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。入直路時居好位。以佳勢上前，二百米處取得領先。末段被亞軍馬匹追迫，但保持佳勢，保住勝果。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W2W2W) In rear when checked and dropped to joint last on 1000M bend, saved ground on the inside turning for home, obtained a clear run over 150M out and finished off the race well.
(Lost left front plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W2W2W) 居後列，勒避。一千米處彎位墮退，並列包尾位置。轉直路彎時走內疊節省腳程。一百五十米處望空，衝刺良佳。
（失去左前蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W5W) From wide draw dropped back to race near last, driven along 500M and wide into straight, closed off fastest to claim 2nd. Nearest finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W5W) 自外檔出閘，墮居接近包尾位置。五百米處受催策。入直路時走外疊。末段衝刺最快，跑獲亞軍。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W5W) Head in air shortly after start, towards rear, commenced move out wide 700m out, good progress to lead 200m out, ran on well and beaten only narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W5W) 起步後不久昂首，居後列。七百米處開始追前，走外疊。追前甚多，二百米處取得領先。末段走勢良佳，僅以短距離落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Average to begin, sat right behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 出閘普通，緊隨領放馬，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。末段衝刺平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W) Raced in touch with leaders, ridden along 400m out to chase leaders, ran on well to close on winner but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。四百米處受催策以追趕領先馬匹。末段以佳勢追近頭馬，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Bumped out of stalls, pressed leader, quickened early to lead 350m out, ran on well and beaten only narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘時發生碰撞，追迫領放馬。率先加速，三百五十米處取得領先。走勢良佳，僅以短距離落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on very well in straight, won by 2-1/2L.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先一個馬位。直路上保持甚佳走勢，以兩個半馬位之先勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Tracked leader on inside, came with a strong looking challenge 250M, tried hard but was always held by the winner. (Jockey - given the option of obtaining cover if circumstances permitted.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬，走內疊。二百五十米處以勁勢上前挑戰。力拼，但一直落後頭馬。（騎師表示，他獲指示可選擇在情況許可下讓坐騎取得遮擋。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Began well from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, shared lead with rival from 650M, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 100M, finished 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。自六百五十米處起與對手並排領先。直路上保持佳勢，但最後一百米未能抗衡頭馬，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Showed good speed to get across and pressed leader, quickened early in home straight and soon in command, won readily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 展現甚快前速以切入內疊，追迫領放馬。直路初加速上前，瞬即控制大局，從容勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, kicked 350m out, ran on well but headed by winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 展現甚快前速以領放。三百五十米處加速。末段以佳勢上前，但接近終點時被頭馬超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W) Chased leader, didn't travel with much fluency, ridden top of home straight, gave ground final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W) 追趕領放馬，走勢欠順。直路初受催策。最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Made all, pressed in front, responded well when pressed on 300m out, stayed on well to hold on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 一放到底。在領放下受追迫。三百米處在催策下反應良佳。保持佳勢，僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Clean jump, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, took the lead approaching 250M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘俐落，居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。趨近二百五十米處時取得領先。末段保持佳勢，但未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Showed good speed to lead 2 off the outside rail, kept on nicely, just held on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;前速甚快，取得領先，走外欄第三疊。保持佳勢，僅保住平頭冠軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Disputed led, ran on strongly to take the lead 700m out, kicked 400m out, margin reduced closing stages but always doing enough.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;爭奪領先。以勁勢追前，七百米處取得領先。四百米處加速帶離。末段領先距離收窄，但一直保持佳勢，穩操勝券。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Bumped heavily out of stalls and lost balance, recovered to race prominently, driven 400m out, dropped away quickly 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;躍出時與對手互相大力碰撞，失去平衡。其後恢復走勢，居前列。四百米處受催策。二百米處迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (4W3W) Commenced well, raced better than midfield on the outside, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(4W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走外疊。沿途沒有遮擋。直路早段未能再增速，最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, tended to hang out throughout, forced to steady on heels 700m out, lost touch final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。沿途傾向外閃。七百米處被迫收慢避開他駒後蹄。最後三百米被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Controlled the tempo up front after a quick getaway, fought bravely final stages only fell short to a classy horse.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，其後上前，主宰步速。末段奮勇力拼，僅負於實力強勁的一駒，所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W1W) Went for the lead on jumping from draw 11, crossed to the fence 800M and led steadily, was strongly challenged by rival final 250M but kept going well to hold on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W1W) 自第十一檔出閘後上前帶頭。八百米處切入內欄，以平穩步速領放。最後二百五十米受對手以勁勢挑戰，但保持佳勢，保住勝果。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Began well in front early stages, gradually taken one back on rail about 1000M out, came to challenge inside the 300M holding some chance but found winner to good.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，早段領先。約一千米處逐漸留後一個馬位，走內欄。三百米處展開挑戰，頗具勝望，但不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Amongst leaders, gradually shifted some 2L back to 4th one-out-one-back rounding home bend, kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居領先馬群中，逐漸留後約兩個馬位。轉直路彎時居第二疊第二位，即馬群中的第四位。直路上保持穩勢，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W3W) Raced keenly early stages and ran wide making the first turn, continued to race wide without cover in a rearward spot for the remainder of the trip, unable to finish off in the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W3W) 早段搶口。首次轉彎時走外疊。餘下途程居後列，繼續在沒有遮擋下走外疊。直路上未能以勁勢衝刺。

formguide.comments_eng: New Zealand PP, a 4-year-old gelding, by U S Navy Flag from Altai Rose, a daughter of Bernardini. Horses by the same sire include Victory Sky and Matsu Victor. This fellow had twelve starts in New Zealand and Australia for three wins (including a 3yo G3 over 1200m) and one placing (including a 3yo G2 over 1400m). He was given two trials in Hong Kong for one placing. He raced handily and finished third under slight pressure, beaten by 2-3/4Ls, over 1000m on turf in Conghua on May 29. In the latest trial, he sat midfield and finished fifth under pressure, beaten by 2-3/4Ls, over 1000m on turf in Conghua on June 22. Prefer to take a watching brief to see how he shapes at his local debut.
formguide.comments_chi: 「海軍旗幟」(U S Navy Flag)之後，在港同父馬包括「樂勝天下」及「江南勇士」等駒，生母出自Bernardini。來港前於紐西蘭及澳洲十二戰得三勝一位，勝出賽事包括一場1200米三歲三級賽，上名賽事則包括一場1400米三歲二級賽。抵港後兩次試閘一次上名。5月29日出試從化草地1000米，早段跟前，末段稍騎下跑第三名，落後頭馬2.75個馬位。最近6月22日出試從化草地1000米，早段居中，末段力策下跑第五名，落後頭馬2.75個馬位。初出暫宜觀望。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Slowly away, held up in last pair, laboured response to pressure 400m out, passed several rivals late but never dangerous.
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 出閘緩慢，留居最後兩位之內。四百米處對催策交出反應。末段超越數匹對手，但從未能構成威脅。
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Waited with towards rear, headway when checked 250m out, stayed on well for clear second, unable to reach winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居後列，留力候上。追前，二百五十米處勒避。保持佳勢，帶離餘駒跑獲亞軍，未能追及頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Average to begin, raced 3 wide in midfield, checked near 1050M, 4 wide from 500M, kept on well until checked approaching 50M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，走第三疊。接近一千零五十米處時勒避。自五百米處起走第四疊。保持佳勢，趨近五十米處時勒避。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Ridden early travelling 4-wide in 6th, improved from 1150M to reach 2L 4th 2-wide onto first bend, hit the front briefly inside the 300M only to be out-sprinted 200M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 早段受催策，居第六位，走第四疊。自一千一百五十米處起推進，開始轉首個彎位時進佔第四位，落後兩個馬位，走第二疊。三百米處一度取得領先，僅於二百米處被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W5W) Out with rest, raced 2 wide in midfield, commenced move near 550M, wide into straight, finished off strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W5W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走第二疊。接近五百五十米處時開始上前。入直路時走外疊。衝刺強勁，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat worse than midfield on the rail, held up and never tested in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路上受困，從未能施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W3W) Bumped leaving stalls and lost ground, in rear, wide in home straight, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W3W) 躍出時發生碰撞，失地，居後列。直路上走外疊，保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(-) (2W2W) Chased leader, under pressure to challenge leaders 550m out, stayed on steadily, tight for room close home, unable to be ridden out to finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(-)(2W2W) 追趕領放馬。五百五十米處在催策下挑戰領先馬匹。保持穩勢，接近終點時受緊迫，未能被力策至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Out with rest, sent forward to take the early lead, headed near 850M, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 與對手同步出閘，早段受催策上前領放。接近八百五十米處時被超越。直路彎居第二位。直路早段未能再增速。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, kicked top of home straight, headed 250m out, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 展現甚快前速，取得領先。直路初加速，二百五十米處被超越。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, tended to shift right in home straight, never on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。直路上傾向向內斜跑。從未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Bumped and lost balance out of stalls, three wide in mid-field without cover, dropped away quickly 300m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 出閘時發生碰撞及失去平衡，居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。三百米處迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W) Waited with in rear, driven along and some headway early in home straight, no extra final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W) 居後列，留力候上。直路早段受催策，略為追前。最後一百五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Bumped at the start, from draw 10 dropped back to near last, had some work to do 400M, finished off nicely to take 5th. Nearest line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 自第十檔起步時發生碰撞，墮居接近包尾位置。四百米處稍為落後。衝刺良佳，取得第五名。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W3W) Sat midfield, traveled only fairly, gave ground quickly in the Straight (Must BT).
(Irregular heart rhythm.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W3W) 居中間位置，走勢僅屬一般。直路上迅速墮退。（必須試閘及格。）
（心律不正常。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Out with rest, raced behind midfield on inner, saved ground on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。直路初未能再增速。最後二百米轉弱。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W5W) Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear, 7 lengths or so back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W5W) 自第十二檔出閘，留居包尾位置。入直路時落後約七個馬位。直路上超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W1W) Checked shortly after start dropping to tail-end, trailed the field until snuck up one closer home turn, effort short-lived.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久勒避，墮居包尾位置。尾隨馬群，直路彎追近一個馬位，但衝刺短暫。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W3W) From wide draw take across behind runners, given a waiting ride at the back 7Ls off the good pace, driven along 500M, wide into straight but failed to pick up. Never threatened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 自外檔出閘，在馬群之後切入，居後列，伺機而動，在快步速下落後領放馬七個馬位。五百米處受催策。入直路時走外疊，但未能加速。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Taken back from a wide draw, was severely checked in the middle stages, made some steady ground final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘後留後。中段大力勒避。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W) Sat last on the rail, held up early part of the Straight, ran on nicely once in the clear.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W) 居包尾位置，走內欄。直路早段受困，望空後以佳勢上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W2W2W) Sat towards rear, improved from 400M, closed off nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W2W2W) 居後列。自四百米處起推進。衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Niggled along in rear of midfield in 7th on rail, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, baulked for a run from inside the 200M and could make no impression in the run to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 受催策，居中間之後第七位，走內欄。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。二百米處起受困。末段毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W2W2W5W) Settled behind midfield 2 wide, swung wide in the straight, kept on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W2W2W5W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。直路上移出外疊，保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W3W6W) Made contact shortly after start, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide approaching 700M, 5 lengths back on turn, very wide into straight, one-paced in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W3W6W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居後列，走第二疊。趨近七百米處時走第三疊。直路彎落後五個馬位。入直路時走大外疊，末段保持同速。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled in front of midfield 2 wide, no luck in running, never seriously tested.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。無路可上。從未能真正施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W) Jumped awkwardly, sat rear, failed to run out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W) 出閘笨拙，居後列。未能應付途程。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W4W) Jumped only fairly, settled towards the rear 8-9Ls back, swung widest into straight before running on mildly to line. No threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列，落後八至九個馬位。入直路時移出最外疊，其後保持普通走勢至終點。未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Jumped only fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, 7 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後七個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began well from an inside barrier, settled down in midfield along the fence, fought hard passing 400M but was always held by first two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自內檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走內欄。跑過四百米處時力拼，但一直落後首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Slightly impeded leaving stalls, rail position in mid-field, challenged up rail 300m out, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘時略為受阻，居中間位置，走內欄。三百米處沿欄展開挑戰。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W5W) Raced in rear out wide, pushed along wide into home straight, unable to improve position, eased when detached 100m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W5W) 居後列，走外疊。入直路時受推策，走外疊。未能推進。一百米處被拋離時收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) In rear after awkward start, clear run 400m out, ran on well final 200m to close on leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘笨拙，居後列。四百米處望空。最後二百米以佳勢上前，追近領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Average to begin, raced 3 wide in midfield, 3 lengths or so back, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，落後約三個馬位，走第三疊。直路彎居相同位置。直路早段未能再增速，保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (6W2W2W) Moderately away from the widest draw, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, dropped towards rear on turn, emptied early in straight, eased thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(6W2W2W) 自大外檔出閘普通，受催策上前，居前列，走外疊。直路彎墮居後列。直路早段力竭，其後收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W3W3W) Dropped out from wide draw, held up last, pushed along widest into home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W3W3W) 自外檔出閘後墮後，留居包尾位置。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Sat behind midfield, gave limited response turning home, couldn't sustain run mid-straight then faded to finish last.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 居中間之後位置。轉直路彎時對催策反應平平。直路中段無以為繼。其後力竭，包尾而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Settled midfield on the rail, raced keenly, made no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。搶口。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (1W1W) Bumped out of stalls, rail position in mid-field, struggled to hold position on bend, outpaced and left behind final 300m.
(Blood in mouth.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(1W1W) 出閘時被碰撞，居中間位置，走內欄。直路彎難以保持位置。最後三百米未能跟上步速，被拋離。
（口內有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W2W) Moved across to the fence shortly after the start from a wide barrier, raced tight in the home straight and unable to be fully ridden out until the last 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W2W) 自外檔出閘後不久切入內欄。直路上緊迫競跑，未能被全力催策直至最後一百米。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W3W) Sat near the rear, closed off fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W3W) 居後列。衝刺一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W2W) Always well behind, never seen with a chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W2W) 一直遙居於後。從未有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced at rear on the outside, still well back on turn, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 出閘笨拙及失地，居包尾位置，走外疊。直路彎仍遙居於後。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Crowded shortly after start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, failed to make any progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久受擠迫，居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Jumped only fairly, taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，留居中間之後位置，走第二疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路初未能再加速。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Taken back to race 2 wide towards rear, a bit closer on turn, 3 wide turning in, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 留後，居後列，走第二疊。直路彎略為追近。入直路時走第三疊。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W3W3W) Moderately away, positioned 2 wide in midfield, commenced move 750M, raced 3 wide, a length or so back on turn, peaked early in straight, kept on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W3W3W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，走第二疊。七百五十米處開始上前，走第三疊。直路彎落後約一個馬位。直路早段未能再增速，保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W3W4W) In touch with leaders, wide into home straight, strong run to challenge leader 100m out, got on top final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W3W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹。入直路時走外疊。走勢強勁，一百米處向領放馬展開挑戰。最後五十米取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Settled worse than midfield 2 wide, showed dash top of the Straight, one pace final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。直路初加速上前。最後一百五十米保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W4W) Towards rear, niggled along a fair way out, gradual headway from 400m out, stayed on into second final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W4W) 居後列，落後頗遠，受催策。自四百米處起逐漸上前。最後五十米保持走勢，跑入亞席。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W2W2W) Began only fairly from gate 12, raced 2 wide behind midfield, very wide turning in, made very good progress in straight and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W2W2W) 自第十二檔出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路上追前甚多，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, angled off rail from 500m out for clear run, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。自五百米處起移離內欄以望空。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W4W) Travelled behind midfield early before drifting back to the rear middle stages, 7Ls to make up top of straight, ran past beaten horses only. Never threatened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W4W) 早段居中間之後位置。中段墮後至後列。直路初落後七個馬位。僅能超越已洩氣的對手，從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W2W4W) From a wide barrier quickest away from the machine, gradually eased back towards the rear, swung widest turning for home, made up good ground late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W2W4W) 自外檔出閘最快，逐漸留居後列。轉直路彎時移出最外疊。末段追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W3W) Jumped best settling one back 3-wide without cover despite ridden early stages, became 3rd in a similar position 600M out and 4th onto home bend, made no further impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W3W) 出閘最快。儘管於早段受催策，但落後一個馬位，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。六百米處居相若的第三位。開始轉直路彎時居第四位。直路上再無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Sat in front of midfield on the rail, nothing extra in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。直路上再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Set in front of midfield, raced tight over the concluding stages, could not make ground (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 居中間之前位置。末段緊迫競跑，未能追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W) Jumped best, gradually taken back to settle in 2L 5th 2-wide, baulked behind runners on straightening and switched out for a run 250M out, produced good late impression closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W) 出閘最快，逐漸留居第五位，落後兩個馬位，走第二疊。入直路時在馬群之後受困。二百五十米處向外移出取位。末段追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Fast break, made running, under pressure 500m out, headed early in home straight, flattened out final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，帶頭競跑。五百米處受催策。直路初被超越。最後二百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W6W) Began well from a wide draw, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, very wide turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W6W) 自外檔出閘迅速，居中間位置，走外疊，大部分途程沒有遮擋。入直路時走大外疊。直路初未能再增速。其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Raced on rail behind midfield early. Kept on evenly in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 早段於馬群中間之後貼欄位置競跑。直路上維持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W) Blundered shortly after the start, sat towards rear, never a threat (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W) 起步後不久失蹄，居後列。從未能構成威脅。(見競賽事件報告。)

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Shifted out abruptly at start, trapped wide in midfield, hung out after passing 700M, dropped to rear on turn, weakened early in straight, unacceptable performance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 起步時急促向外斜跑，居中間位置，走外疊。跑過七百米處後外閃。直路彎墮居後列。直路初轉弱。表現難以接受。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W) Settled behind midfield on the rail, closed off nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。末段衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W) Bumped on jumping, raced 2 wide in midfield, difficult to settle in the early stages, found rail near 800M, 3-1/2L back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W) 躍出時被碰撞，居中間位置，走第二疊。早段難以穩定走勢。接近八百米處時移入內欄。入直路時落後三個半馬位。直路早段對催策反應平平，最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Sat worse than midfield on the rail, held up rounding the Home Turn, stayed on late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。轉直路彎時受困。末段保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(-) (5W2W2W) Battled for lead early, raced outside of leader 500m out, hung right in behind that rival home straight, no extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(-)(5W2W2W) 早段爭奪領先。五百米處居領放馬外側。直路上在領放馬之後內閃。再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W) Began only fairly from a wide draw, taken back to race at rear on the outside, inconvenienced near 700M, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W) 自外檔出閘僅屬一般，留居後列，走外疊。接近七百米處時受妨礙。入直路時落後三至四個馬位。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Made contact shortly after start, raced in 3rd, 2-3/4L back at 400M, hard ridden after passing 400M but only showed limited response, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;起步後不久發生觸碰，居第三位。四百米處落後二又四分三個馬位。跑過四百米處後受力策，但反應僅屬平平。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Sat rear, traveled on the rail, minor progress made (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。末段略為上前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Settled midfield on the rail, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Away with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段未能再增速。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Raced in touch with leaders, keen mid-race, stayed on for pressure, no threat to winner, passed by runner-up final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。中段搶口。在催策下保持走勢。未能威脅頭馬。最後五十米被亞軍馬匹超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Mid-field, headway when badly hampered 250m out, unable to recover.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 居中間位置。追前，二百五十米處受嚴重阻礙。未能恢復走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Crowded and bumped at start, three wide in mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, struggling.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 起步時受擠迫及發生碰撞，居中間位置，走第三疊。入直路時受推策，走外疊。掙扎上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Three wide in rear of mid-field, keen middle stages, pushed along widest into home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。中段搶口。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Caught 3 wide no cover midfield, ran on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。末段走勢良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Bumped out of stalls, held up last, pushed along widest into home straight, ran on strongly final 200m, just failed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 出閘時發生碰撞，留居包尾位置。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。最後二百米走勢強勁，僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W3W4W) Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, hard ridden after passing 450M, wide into straight, kept on same pace in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W3W4W) 起步時被碰撞，居中間位置，走第二疊。跑過四百五十米處後受力策。入直路時走外疊。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W1W) Settled in front of midfield, held up at the early Straight, no clear run until 150M, finished off okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之前位置。直路初受困，未能望空直至一百五十米處。衝刺尚可。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Waited with in rear, had to angle out for run 200m out, stayed on but never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 居後列，留力候上。二百米處須向外移出取位。保持走勢，但從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W1W) Crowded shortly after start, settled in rear of mid-field, rail position throughout, ridden from top of home straight, ran on well final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W1W) 起步後不久受擠迫，居中間之後位置。沿途走內欄。自直路初起受催策。最後二百米走勢良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Bumped at the start, saved ground on the inside and stayed close enough to leaders, lacked a strong response on straightening, had difficulty obtaining clear running 150M but couldn't gain ground on leaders late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生碰撞，走內疊節省腳程，落後領先馬匹不遠。入直路時對催策反應欠強勁。一百五十米處難以望空，但末段未能追近領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Raced 2 wide at rear early. Kept on evenly in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 早段於馬群後列二疊位置競跑。直路上維持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W) Sat last, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W) 居包尾位置。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Sat worse than midfield, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置。對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W2W) Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the inside, 7 lengths or so back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列，走內疊。轉入直路時落後約七個馬位。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W2W3W4W) Taken back to race towards rear on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 750M, very wide turning in, finished off strongly to gain a dead heat victory. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W2W3W4W) 留居後列，走外疊。跑過七百五十米處後略為追近。入直路時走大外疊。衝刺強勁，取得平頭冠軍。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Soon taken across from a poor draw for rails run at the back, commenced move coming onto home bend improving under pressure to within 4L of pace in 7th briefly early in straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘後瞬即切入內欄，居後列。開始轉直路彎時開始上前，在催策下推進，直路早段一度居第七位，落後領放馬不逾四個馬位。最後一百五十米無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W3W) Held up, struggling entering home straight, left behind.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 留後。入直路時掙扎上前，被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began smartly from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先四分三個馬位。直路上保持佳勢，但接近終點時不敵頭馬。
