runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生碰撞，在催策下上前領放。入直路時領先一又四分三馬位。直路上保持佳勢，但最後五十米未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W3W) Sat on pace 2 wide, took the lead near 150M, kept on well but could not hold off the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W3W) 居前列，走第二疊。接近一百五十米處時取得領先。保持佳勢，但未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Unbalanced after being bumped at the start. Sent forward to take the lead, travelled strongly, led by 2L turning in and all the way to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 起步時被碰撞，其後失去平衡。受催策上前領放，走勢強勁。入直路時領先二個馬位。一放到底，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Tracked leader, challenged alongside winner from 300m out, unable to get past that rival.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 跟隨領放馬。自三百米處起在頭馬側旁展開挑戰，但未能超越對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W4W) Still plenty to do 400m out after held up, stayed on out wide, never nearer.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W4W) 留後。四百米處仍落後頗遠。在外疊保持走勢。以末段最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Settled midfield on the rail, one pace when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Started well and across from wide draw to track leading pair, moved smoothly to front 200m out, winner too strong final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，切入跟隨領先兩駒。走勢暢順，二百米處取得領先。最後五十米不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(-) (4W2W2W) Jumped well from gate 10, raced prominently on the outside, 1/2L back turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(-)(4W2W2W) 自第十檔出閘迅速，居前列，走外疊。轉入直路時落後半個馬位。直路初保持佳勢，一百五十米處未能再增速。末段走勢平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W2W) Chased leader, stayed on for clear second but never quite able to challenge winner.
(Lost left front plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W2W) 追趕領放馬。保持走勢，跑獲亞軍，帶離餘駒，但從未能真正挑戰頭馬。
（失去左前蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Ridden forward from wide stall, tracked leading pair, loomed up to lead 200m out, ran on well to line but headed close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 自大外檔出閘後受催策上前，跟隨領先兩駒。二百米處上前領放。保持佳勢至終點，但接近終點時被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Ridden hard to lead, traveled nicely, led all the way to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 在力策下取得領先。走勢良佳。其後直領到底，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Tracked pace, keen when hampered after 400m, lacked speed to challenge winner final 300m but stayed on for clear second.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領放馬。跑了四百米後受阻礙時搶口。最後三百米未能增速以挑戰頭馬，但保持走勢，帶離餘駒，獲得亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(+) (2W2W) Chased the leader, traveled okay, responded reasonably well when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(+)(2W2W) 追趕領放馬。走勢尚可。對催策反應不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W) Raced in touch, under pressure 300m out, weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W) 緊隨領先馬匹。三百米處受催策。末段轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Dropped steadily to last few in back straight, made no further impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 對面直路上逐漸墮後，居最後數位之內，其後再無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Sat on pace 2 wide, closed off strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 居前列，走第二疊。衝刺強勁，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Tracked pace, pushed along 300m out, stuck to task but lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。三百米處受推策。持續力拼，但未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Tracked pace out wide without cover, bumped 700m out and lost balance, taken wider on bend, not beaten far.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。七百米處被碰撞，失去平衡。直路彎被帶出較外疊。所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Began well, soon in front and led at steady pace, headed top of straight, fought hard but not going the pace of leaders final 250M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，瞬即取得領先，以平穩步速領放。直路初被超越。力拼，但最後二百五十米加速不及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W5W) Settled midfield, raced very wide and without cover, found nothing in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W5W) 居中間位置，走大外疊，沒有遮擋。直路上再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Ridden 3-wide in midfield early stages, 6th 2-wide rounding home bend, ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 早段居中間位置，走第三疊。轉直路彎時居第六位，走第二疊。直路上追前，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W4W) Gradually settled in midfield and wide without cover, remained in similar position into straight, ran home one-paced.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W4W) 逐漸居中間位置，走外疊，沒有遮擋。入直路時居相若位置。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (3W4W) Raced in touch, keen to halfway, good headway from 300m out, led 100m out, ran on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(3W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹，半程前搶口。自三百米處起追前甚多。一百米處取得領先，末段走勢良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (4W4W) Mid-field, three wide, stayed on steadily final 300m, overhauled runner-up to lead late on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(4W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。最後三百米保持穩勢。末段超越亞軍馬匹，取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W3W) Jumped awkwardly, made contact with the right side of its starting gate and lost ground, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W3W) 出閘笨拙，觸碰閘廂右側，因而失地，落後約四個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路初未能再加速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Awkward start, rail position in mid-field, unable to secure clear run until 300m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，居中間位置，走內欄。未能望空直至三百米處。保持走勢，但未能增速以追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (6W4W) Sat handy 4 wide, raced very wide and without cover, weakened and faded from near 300M. (Performance unacceptable, must trial.) (See incident report.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(6W4W) 居前列位置，走第四疊。沿途走大外疊，沒有遮擋。接近三百米處時轉弱及力竭。（表現難以接受，必須試閘及格。）（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Sat just behind the leaders, one pace when asked
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居領先馬匹稍後位置。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) One of the first few away and tracked leaders, stuck on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 出閘最快數駒之一，跟隨領先馬匹。保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Disputed led in three wide, ridden top of home straight, dropped away quickly final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 爭奪領先，走第三疊。直路初受催策。最後三百米迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped well from draw 1 and able to lead the race at steady tempo, headed near 200M, weakened final stages but managed to hang on for 3rd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，能以穩定步速領放。接近二百米處時被超越。末段轉弱，但仍能保住季席。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W3W) Average to begin, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 250M. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘普通，落後領放馬一至兩個馬位。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段對催策反應平平。最後二百五十米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, blocked off when going for run 400m out to 150m out, checked when trying to improve 100m out, not fully extended.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。四百米處至一百五十米處之間在試圖取位之際受困。一百米處在嘗試推進之際勒避。未能全力施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W4W) Keen towards rear, one paced under pressure and unable to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W4W) 居後列，搶口。在催策下保持同速，未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W2W) Jumped only fairly, sat towards rear on the rail, switched out entering the Straight, made steady progress to the line.
(Lame in right front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列，走內欄。入直路時向外移出。末段穩步上前。
（右前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W3W6W) Sat behind midfield 3 wide with cover, turned very wide into the home straight, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W3W6W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。入直路時走大外疊。走勢平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Settled in front of midfield on the rail, did not finish off after being crowded near 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。接近三百米處時受擠迫，其後未能以勁勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began only fairly and crowded, raced at tail, 7 to 8 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般及受擠迫，居包尾位置。入直路時落後七至八個馬位。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Shifted in shortly after start and made contact, sent forward to take the lead, hard ridden from 300M, peaked and headed 150M, kept on evenly to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;起步後不久向內斜跑，與他駒互相觸碰，受催策上前領放。自三百米處起受力策。一百五十米處未能再增速及被超越。保持穩勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(-) Prominent, improved to lead against far rail 600m out, driven 400m out, headed by winner 200m out, no match for winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(-)居前列。沿外欄推進上前，六百米處取得領先。四百米處受催策。二百米處被頭馬超越，未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Made running against stand rail, kicked 1.5L clear 300m out, headed 100m out, no extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;沿外欄帶頭。三百米處加速帶離一個半馬位。一百米處被超越，再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W3W) Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, difficult to settle in the early and middle stages, peaked approaching 300M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W3W) 起步時與對手互相碰撞，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。早段及中段難以穩定走勢。趨近三百米處時未能再加速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Jumped with them, raced prominently, 2 away from the stands' rail, hard ridden from 300M but failed to quicken, weakened gradually final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;與對手同步躍出，居前列，走外欄第三疊。自三百米處起受力策，但未能加速。最後一百米逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Tassort from Grenada, a daughter of Dolphin Street. Horses by the same sire include Live Wire and Comet Radiance. He is a half-brother to Blue Marlin. This fellow was given five trials in Hong Kong for one win. He made all to win under slight pressure, by 1/2L, over 800m on turf in Conghua on March 30. In the latest trial, he raced handily and finished eighth under pressure, beaten by 1-3/4Ls, over 1200m AWT at Sha Tin on June 23. Prefer to take a watching brief to see how he shapes at his local debut.
formguide.comments_chi: Tassort之後，在港同父馬包括「烈焰光芒」及「燊輝之星」等駒，生母出自「多分街」(Dolphin Street)。與「馬林」為半兄弟馬。抵港後試閘五次得一勝。3月30日出試從化草地800米，早段領放，末段稍騎下以半個馬位之先勝出。最近6月23日出試田泥1200米，早段跟前，末段力策下跑第八名，落後頭馬1.75個馬位。初出暫宜觀望。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, weakened quickly over 300m out, eased final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 緊隨領先馬匹。三百米處迅速轉弱。最後二百米收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Waited with in mid-field, pushed along when tight for room 200m out, no impression when again short of room closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居中間位置，留力候上。二百米處受推策，但受緊迫。末段再度缺乏空位，毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Caught 3 wide off pace, weakened in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居後競跑，走第三疊。直路上轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Prominent chasing leader under 7lb claimer, fought on early straight to stay in contention, lost 2nd nearing 200M, no extra final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 在獲減七磅的騎師胯下居前列，追趕領放馬。直路初力拼以保持爭逐機會。接近二百米處時失去第二位。末段再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, travelled keenly in the middle stages, peaked early in straight, made contact and unbalanced near 250M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 起步後不久被碰撞，居中間位置，走外疊。中段搶口。直路初未能再增速。接近二百五十米處時與對手互相觸碰，失去平衡，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; In rear after sluggish start, raced keenly 700M out, held when checked near 250M, recovered well and made up steady ground (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;起步緩慢，居後列。七百米處搶口。接近二百五十米處時在勒避之際受困。末段迅速恢復走勢。其後穩步上前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Away with them, raced prominently, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked on run 300M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居前列，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。三百米處未能再增速，其後轉弱。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Zoustar from Brooke's Edge, a daughter of Hinchinbrook. Horses by the same sire include Patch Of Theta and Californiatotality. This fellow was given nine trials in Hong Kong. In the latest trial, he sat midfield and finished fourth under the whip, beaten by 2-3/4L, over 1200m AWT at Sha Tin on June 25. He will probably need a run.
formguide.comments_chi: 「摘星勇驥」(Zoustar)之後，在港同父馬包括「手機錶霸」及「加州動員」等駒，生母出自「美麗小島」(Hinchinbrook)。抵港後試閘九次。最近6月25日出試田泥1200米，早段居中，末段鞭策下跑第四名，落後頭馬2.75個馬位。首戰熱身為主。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Crowded shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the inside, made contact near 700M, saved ground on turn, no clear run early in straight, cleared 150M, showed limited response thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久受擠迫，居中間之後位置，走內疊。接近七百米處時發生觸碰。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能望空，一百五十米處望空，其後對催策反應平平。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Settled in mid-field, pushed along 400m out, unable to improve position.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;居中間位置。四百米處受推策，未能推進上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat midfield 2 wide, one pace when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Raced in touch with leaders, pushed along 200m out, one paced and unable to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 緊隨領先馬匹。二百米處受推策。保持同速，未能展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Mid-field, stayed on for pressure final 200m, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置。最後二百米在催策下保持走勢，但速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W5W) Jumped only fairly and sat towards the rear, overracing, made minor progress in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W5W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列。搶口。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W) Disputed lead, faded final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W) 爭奪領先。最後二百米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W2W2W) Bumped start, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W2W2W) 起步時與對手互相碰撞，居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段未能再增速，最後一百五十米逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W4W) Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, ran on fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W4W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。末段走勢一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W3W) Prominent at the start before drifting backward to forward of midfield 3-wide without cover, gained closer to 2L 5th home bend, kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W3W) 起步時居前列，其後墮居中間之前位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎追近，居第五位，落後兩個馬位。直路上保持穩勢，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W3W) Began well, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之後位置，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W) Bumped leaving stalls, settled in mid-field, not best of runs in home straight when trying to improve, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W) 出閘時發生碰撞，居中間位置。直路上在嘗試推進時取位不太暢順。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W4W6W) Taken back from wide draw, very wide on bend, stayed on final 200m, never nearer.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W4W6W) 自外檔出閘後留後。直路彎走大外疊。最後二百米保持走勢，以末段最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (5W3W4W) Moderately away from a wide draw, unable to slot in, trapped wide in midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, very wide into straight, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(5W3W4W) 自外檔出閘普通，未能切入內疊，居中間位置，走外疊。大部分途程沒有遮擋。入直路時走大外疊。末段以穩勢衝刺。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Never far off the pace, in the 6th spot at 400M less than 2L adrift of leader, failed to muster the speed to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;沿途距離領放馬不遠。四百米處居第六位，落後領放馬不足兩個馬位。未能加速展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Crowded at start, settled in rear of mid-field, short of room 250m out to 150m out, unable to recover.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;起步時受擠迫，居中間之後位置。二百五十米處至一百五十米處之間空位不足。其後未能恢復走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Hurried along early stages from gate 12 and positioned one off the outside rail just behind the leading division, boxed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;自第十二檔出閘，早段受催策，居領先馬匹稍後位置，走外欄第二疊。以佳勢力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) Shifted out at start, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the middle track, hard ridden approaching 300M, finished off well to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)起步時向外斜跑。落後領放馬三個馬位，在跑道中央競跑。趨近三百米處時受力策。衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Bumped on jumping, raced in midfield, nearer to the middle track, commenced move after passing 350M, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;躍出時與對手互相碰撞，居中間位置，靠近跑道中央競跑。跑過三百五十米處後開始上前。一百五十米處取得領先。保持佳勢至終點，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Jumped only fairly, positioned 1-3/4L behind the leader, 2 away from the stands' rail, commenced move after passing 350M, took the lead 250M, headed 150M, kept on well to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;出閘僅屬一般，落後領放馬一又四分三個馬位，走外欄第三疊。跑過三百五十米處後開始上前。二百五十米處取得領先，一百五十米處被超越。保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; In touch with leaders towards centre of course, bumped 350m out and soon weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;跟隨領先馬匹，在接近跑道中央競跑。三百五十米處被碰撞，瞬即轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Led early, headed 700m out, remained prominent, struggled to hold position halfway out, gave ground final 400m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;早段領先。七百米處被超越。保持居前列。半程時難以保持位置。最後四百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Raced prominently on leader's quarters, briefly outpaced by that rival 300m out, responded well to come through and lead 100m out, strong to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居前列，落後領放馬半個馬位。三百米處一度被該駒拋離。其後對催策反應良佳，上前。一百米處取得領先。末段衝刺強勁。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Bumped heavily exiting stalls, mid division, checked and blundered 800m out, checked against rail 300m out, well beaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 出閘時發生大力碰撞，居中間位置。八百米處勒避及失蹄。三百米處沿欄勒避。所負甚遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Bumped at the start and sat midfield 4 off the outside fence, did his best work late, looking for a further trip.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;起步時發生碰撞，居中間位置，走外欄第五疊。末段表現最佳，宜增程角逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Fully utilised the inside gate and led the event, failed to show much response in the home straight and weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 充分利用內檔優勢，帶頭競跑。直路上對催策未有太大反應，轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat outside the lead, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居領放馬外側。直路上轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat outside the lead, weakened and faded in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居領放馬外側。直路上轉弱及力竭。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened gradually final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先半個馬位。三百米處未能再加速，被超越。最後二百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Showed good speed to lead, ridden top of home straight, joined by rivals 200m out, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 展現甚快前速，取得領先。直路初受催策。二百米處被對手追及，最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Away well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 2-1/2Ls turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先兩個半馬位。直路上保持佳勢，但接近終點時未能抗衡頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W2W) Strode forward, checked 1500M by a rival who was crossing to the lead, sat outside leader throughout in a fast run race, run ended 250M and weakened away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 展步上前。千五米處被領放的對手過頭時勒避。在賽事步速偏快下沿途居領放馬外側。二百五十米處再無餘力及轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Raced in touch with leaders, switched back to rail and headway 200m out, stayed on, clear of remainder.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹。二百米處移回內欄，上前。保持走勢。拋離其他馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Wide in mid-field, ridden along to hold position throughout, weakened 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走外疊。沿途受催策以保持位置。二百米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Away well, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W3W3W) Began well from gate 10, raced 3 wide better than midfield, no cover throughout, carried wider turning in, kept on same pace in straight, not enough room close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W3W3W) 自第十檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第三疊。沿途沒有遮擋。入直路時被帶出更外疊。直路上保持同速。接近終點時空位不足。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W2W2W) Settled in front of midfield, traveled okay, briefly held up at the top of the Straight, closed off okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W2W2W) 居中間之前位置，走勢不俗。直路初一度受困。末段衝刺不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W) Shifted in at start and bumped, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, moved closer after passing 1100M, 2nd on turn, 2 wide, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W) 起步時向內斜跑，被碰撞，居中間之前位置，走外疊。跑過千一米處後追近。直路彎居第二位，走第二疊。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide better than midfield, similar position on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路初對催策反應平平。最後一百五十米逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W1W) Sat behind midfield on the rail, made no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W) Three wide in mid-field, ridden top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge, no extra final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。直路初受催策，但速度不足以展開挑戰。最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat towards the rear on the rail, made minor ground. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。末段略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; Began well, restrained to race in midfield 3Ls back, couldn't accelerate enough passing halfway. Never a threat to leaders.
(Lost left front plate.)
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;出閘迅速，受約束，居中間位置，落後三個馬位。跑過半程時加速力不足。從未能威脅領先馬匹。
（失去左前蹄的蹄鐵。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) From draw 1 always in touch behind leaders, ran on well final 300M but couldn't get near to the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘，一直居領先馬匹之後的啣接位置。最後三百米走勢良佳，但未能追近頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Held up from wide draw, taken to outer 200m out, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 自大外檔出閘後留後。二百米處移出外疊。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W2W) Sat in front of midfield 3 wide, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W2W) 居中間之前位置，走第三疊。保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Raced 2 wide in midfield early. Made progress in the Straight for 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 早段於馬群中間二疊位置競跑。直路上上前，取得第二名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Slowly away, wide towards rear, hung left halfway, very wide turning into home straight, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 出閘緩慢，居後列，走外疊。半程時外閃。入直路時走大外疊。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped only fairly, sat on pace, weakened inside 150M (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，居前列。最後一百五十米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Away with them, raced prominently, 2 wide, same position on turn, took the lead 300M, peaked and headed 150M, kept on evenly to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居前列，走第二疊。直路彎居相同位置。三百米處取得領先。一百五十米處未能再增速及被超越。保持穩勢，跑獲亞軍。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Toronado from We'll Never Know, a daughter of Starspangledbanner. Horses by the same sire include Helios Express and Little Paradise. This fellow was given six trials in Hong Kong. In the latest trial, he sat midfield and finished seventh under pressure, beaten by 1-1/2Ls, over 1200m AWT at Sha Tin on June 23. He will probably need a run.
formguide.comments_chi: 「豪華房車」(Toronado)之後，在港同父馬包括「驕陽明駒」及「小鳥天堂」等駒，生母出自「花旗」(Starspangledbanner)。抵港後試閘六次。最近6月23日出試田泥1200米，早段居中，末段力策下跑第七名，落後頭馬1.5個馬位。首戰熱身為主。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W) In rear after slow start, some headway under pressure but never a threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W) 出閘緩慢，居後列。在催策下略為追前，但從未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Mid-field, raced three wide, lost place top of home straight, soon well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。直路初失位，瞬即遙遙落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, raced keenly in the middle stages, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually inside final furlong.
(Blood in mouth.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(2W2W) 留居中間之後位置，走第二疊。中段搶口。直路初對催策反應平平。最後二百米逐漸轉弱。
（口內有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W) Mid-field, three wide, under pressure early in home straight, limited response, weakened 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。直路早段在催策下反應平平。二百米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W2W) Shared 5th about 3L off the pace on rail when checked and lost position 900M out, 4L back in 7th rounding home bend, no clear run early in straight and forced to check 300M out, produced some late impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W2W) 並居第五位，落後領放馬約三個馬位，走內欄。九百米處勒避及失位。轉直路彎時居第七位，落後四個馬位。直路初未能望空。三百米處被迫勒避。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (3W4W) Sat in front of midfield, raced wide, gave ground quickly inside 150M (See Incident Report).
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間之前位置，走外疊。一百五十米處迅速墮退。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Sat in front of midfield on the rail, weakened and gave ground in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。直路上轉弱及墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (1W1W1W) Sat towards the rear on the rail, made ground along the rail.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(1W1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。末段沿欄追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Shifted in and bumped leaving stalls, tracked pace out wide without cover, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 出閘時向內斜跑及與對手互相碰撞，跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W5W) Shifted in abruptly and bumped heavily out of stalls, raced wide in rear, pushed along widest into home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W5W) 出閘時急促向內斜跑及發生大力碰撞，居後列，走外疊。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped only fairly, sat behind midfield, held up over the concluding stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置。末段受困。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W2W) Recovered from slow start to race in mid-field, stayed on final 200m but lacked pace to trouble front two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W2W) 出閘緩慢，其後恢復走勢，居中間位置。最後二百米保持走勢，但速度不足以威脅首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Slowly away, recovered to race in rear of mid-field, pushed along over 300m out, unable to quicken and no real impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 出閘緩慢，其後恢復走勢，居中間之後位置。三百米處受推策，但未能加速及構成真正威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Chased the leader, raced wide throughout, gave ground in the Straight (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 追趕領放馬，沿途走外疊。直路上墮退。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(+) (3W2W) Tracked leader, carried left 300m out, unable to stay with winner final 200m but stayed on to hold second.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(+)(3W2W) 跟隨領放馬。三百米處被帶向外跑。最後二百米未能跟上頭馬，但保持走勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Began well, positioned 1-1/4L behind the leader on rail, same position on turn, finished off well to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，落後領放馬一又四分一個馬位，走內欄。直路彎居相同位置。末段以佳勢衝刺，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (6W2W4W) Sat handy 2 wide, run peaked at 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(6W2W4W) 居前列，走第二疊。一百米處未能再增速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(+) (1W1W) Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, peaked and headed 150M, weakened gradually final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(+)(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前取得領先。入直路時領先一個馬位。一百五十米處未能再增速，被超越。最後一百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Began well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, 3/4L back turning in, took the lead 300M, peaked and headed 200M, weakened final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，居前列，走外疊。入直路時落後四分三馬位。三百米處取得領先。二百米處未能再增速，被超越。最後一百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Ridden along to lead, traveled strongly, led all the way to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 受催策以領放，走勢強勁。一放到底掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W1W1W1W) Gradually settled at the back from a wide barrier, detached from over 500M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W1W1W1W) 自外檔出閘，逐漸留居後列。自五百米處起被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W2W1W) Settled in mid-field, keen early stages, ridden to hold position 900m out, outpaced and left behind in home straight, eased once well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W2W1W) 居中間位置。早段搶口。九百米處受催策以保持位置。直路上未能跟上步速，被拋離。遙遙落後時隨即收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (1W1W1W1W) Reserved in mid-division 5Ls off the pace before keeping on steadily over final 300M to take 4th. (Jockey fined for returning to scale 2 lbs overweight.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(1W1W1W1W) 留居中間位置，落後領放馬五個馬位。最後三百米保持穩勢，取得第四名。（騎師因返回覆磅時超磅兩磅而被罰款。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W1W) Gradually settled in midfield, drifted further back when tempo increased 800M out, never recovered.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W1W) 逐漸居中間位置。八百米處步速加快時進一步墮退。從未能收復失地。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W1W) Settled in front of midfield, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W1W) 居中間之前位置，走勢尚可。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Midfield on rail early stages, made headway 1400M out to be 2L 3rd onto home bend, badly baulked for a run after straightening until the 300M, ran on to hold every chance throughout final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 早段居中間位置，走內欄。千四米處上前。開始轉直路彎時居第三位，落後兩個馬位。入直路後嚴重受困直至三百米處。末段沿途保持走勢，一度甚具爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Jumped awkwardly, chased the leader, traveled smoothly, closed off nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘笨拙，追趕領放馬，走勢暢順。衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (3W4W) Dropped out from widest draw, three wide without cover, pushed along widest into home straight, ran on strongly final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(3W4W) 自最外檔出閘後墮後，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。最後二百米以勁勢上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, bumped 700m out, good headway on bend, challenged and every chance from 400m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。七百米處碰撞他駒。直路彎追前甚多。自四百米處起展開挑戰，一度甚具爭勝機會。末段在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Taken back to race towards rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back turning in, finished off strongly to take a place, nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 留居後列，落後約六個馬位，走外疊。入直路時落後相同距離。衝刺強勁，跑獲季軍。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Settled behind midfield 3 wide, ran on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。以佳勢上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W4W) Taken back from gate 10, raced 2 wide at rear, wider on turn, made some headway in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W4W) 自第十檔出閘，留居後列，走第二疊。直路彎走更外疊。直路上略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Clean jump, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘俐落，受催策上前領放。入直路時受對手挑戰。三百米處未能再增速，被超越。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W3W) Three wide in rear, wide into home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W3W) 居後列，走第三疊。入直路時走外疊。末段速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Sat on pace, traveled smoothly on the rail, pressed on near the 600M, closed off strongly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居前列，走內欄，走勢暢順。接近六百米處時受催策。末段衝剌強勁。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W1W2W) Waited with towards rear, under pressure 500m out, followed winner through in home straight, ran on well final 200m to close on winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W1W2W) 居後列，留力候上。五百米處受催策。直路上跟隨頭馬上前。最後二百米以佳勢衝刺，追近頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W4W) Sat midfield 2 wide, unable to quickened in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。直路上未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W1W) Wide early, pushed up to lead before halfway, headed 300m out, no extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W1W) 早段走外疊。半程前受推策，上前領放。三百米處被超越，再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced behind midfield on the outside, slightly improved on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 自大外檔出閘，留居中間之後位置，走外疊。直路彎略為推進上前。直路早段對催策反應平平。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W2W) Crowded shortly after start, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, 4 lengths back turning in, one-paced in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W2W) 起步後不久受擠迫，居中間稍後位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後四個馬位。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (3W2W2W4W) Jumped only fairly, settled handy, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
(Lame in right hind leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(3W2W2W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，居前列。對催策毫無反應。（見競賽事件報告。）
（右後腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W3W) Began only fairly, raced 2 wide at rear, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後六至七個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W4W) Waited with towards rear, taken wider 900m out without cover, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W4W) 居後列，留力候上。九百米處被帶出較外疊，沒有遮擋。速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W3W) Rail position in mid-field, under pressure 350m out, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W3W) 居中間位置，走內欄。三百五十米處受催策。保持同速，未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (1W3W) Jumped only fairly, taken back to race at rear on the inside, angled out 550M, made good progress in straight to make frame, nearest finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(1W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，留居後列，走內疊。五百五十米處向外移出。直路上追前甚多，取得第四名。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Held up in last pair, no impression under pressure, never competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 留居最後兩位之內。在催策下毫無表現。從未有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W1W) Settled in mid-field, under pressure 400m out to chase leaders, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間位置。四百米處受催策，追趕領先馬匹。保持走勢，但速度不足以追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W1W) Mid-field, in touch with leaders top of home straight, unable to quicken.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W1W) 居中間位置。直路初緊隨領先馬匹。未能增速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W3W) Sat near the rear 3 wide, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W3W) 居後列，走第三疊。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W2W2W2W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, 8 lengths or so back turning in, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W2W2W2W) 自外檔出閘，留居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後約八個馬位。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (3W3W3W4W) Settled worse than midfield, switched out rounding the Turn, dashed on inside 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(3W3W3W4W) 居中間之後位置。轉直路彎時向外移出。最後一百米加速上前取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W2W4W) Sat worse than midfield, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W2W4W) 居中間之後位置。對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat towards the rear 2 wide, angled out in the Straight, stayed on well, just missed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居後列，走第二疊。直路上向外移出。保持佳勢，僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Settled in last few, obtained a clear run 300M out, ran on well inside final 200M past beaten runners closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 居最後數位之內。三百米處望空。最後二百米以佳勢上前。末段超越數匹已洩氣潰敗的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W4W) Sat midfield, traveled okay, switched out at the Turn, made steady progress when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走勢尚可。直路彎向外移出。在催策下以穩勢追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide towards rear, 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress in straight without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 與對手同步躍出，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時落後七個馬位。直路上追前甚多，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W4W) Sat towards rear, directed out in the Straight, made steady ground late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W4W) 居後列。直路上向外移出。末段穩步追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W1W) Sat near the rear on the rail, never seriously tested when held up early, made decent ground late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W1W) 居後列，走內欄。直路早段受困時未能真正施為。末段追前頗多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Held up, never out of rear, held when short of room 50m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 留後，從未超越後列位置。五十米處空位不足之際受困。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (1W2W) Slowly away, held up, no impression when ridden along home straight.
(Lost right front plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(1W2W) 出閘緩慢，留後。直路上在催策下毫無表現。
（失去右前蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W1W1W) Taken back to race at tail, 8 lengths or so back turning in, kept to inside after straightening and made some progress.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W1W1W) 留居包尾位置。入直路時落後約八個馬位，轉入直路後保持走內疊，略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked on run 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘稍慢，居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初略為追前。二百米處未能再增速。其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Taken back to race towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 留居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。入直路後保持走內疊，末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W5W) Rear of mid-division, headway wide over 400m out, sustained run to lead over 100m out, headed close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W5W) 居中間之後位置。四百米處在外疊上前。持續上前，一百米處取得領先。接近終點時被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W4W4W) Held up, still in rear entering home straight, stayed on in wide position but never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W4W4W) 留後。入直路時仍居後列。末段走外疊，保持走勢，但從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Began fairly, raced 2 wide towards rear, 3 wide from 500M, 6 lengths back turning in, made little progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 出閘一般，居後列，走第二疊。自五百米處起走第三疊。入直路時落後六個馬位。直路上略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W1W2W) Began well from gate 1, raced slightly better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly to score by a neck.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W1W2W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間稍前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。末段衝刺強勁，以一馬頸之先勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W2W) Mid-field, one paced under pressure and unable to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W2W) 居中間位置。在催策下保持同速，未能展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W3W) Sat towards the rear, picked off a few weakened rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 居後列。末段超越數匹已轉弱的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W4W) Made contact at start, raced at rear on the outside, 6 lengths or so back turning in, failed to make any progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W4W) 起步時與對手互相觸碰，居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後約六個馬位。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Tightened at start and soon dropped to the rear, never seen with a chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 起步時受緊迫，瞬即墮居後列。從未看似有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Held up in last pair, still in rear turning into home straight, unable to make any impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 留居最後兩位之內。轉入直路時仍居後列。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W2W) Jumped only fairly, ended up in last 6-7Ls off leader, could not muster any sort of challenge in the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，居包尾位置，落後領放馬六至七個馬位。直路上未能加速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W1W3W) Bumped shortly after start, positioned 1 to 2 lengths behind the leader on the inside, angled out approaching 450M, showed very good response in straight, took the lead 200M, kept on well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W1W3W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，落後領放馬一至兩個馬位，走內疊。趨近四百五十米處時向外移出。直路上對催策反應甚佳，二百米處取得領先，保持佳勢至終點，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, effort entering home straight, unable to challenge winner but stuck to task for clear second.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。入直路時發力。未能挑戰頭馬，但持續力拼，帶離餘駒跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W4W2W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, improved after passing 800M, challenged the leader turning in, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W4W2W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間位置，走第二疊。跑過八百米處後推進。入直路時挑戰領放馬。直路上保持佳勢，獲得亞軍，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W3W5W) Began only fairly, raced behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W3W5W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走外疊。轉入直路時落後約四個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W3W2W5W) Began only fairly, raced 3 wide behind midfield, 2 wide after entering the back straight, commenced move 600M, 7 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W3W2W5W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走第三疊。進入對面直路後走第二疊。六百米處開始上前。入直路時落後七個馬位。直路上略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (3W3W4W4W) Sat 4 wide worse than midfield, closed off okay. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(3W3W4W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第四疊。末段衝刺不俗。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W2W3W) Settled in front of midfield on the rail, switched out rounding the Home Turn, closed off okay. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W2W3W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。轉直路彎時向外移出，衝刺不俗。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Raced in touch, keen mid-race, stuck on rail and had to wait for run until 300m out, picked up well to challenge, found only winner too strong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹。中段搶口。沿欄受困，須等待空位出現直至三百米處。末段以佳勢加速以展開挑戰。僅不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W) Sat handy, raced keenly early, traveled wide, had every chance.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W) 居前列。早段搶口。走外疊。已獲機會盡展所長。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Sat midfield on the rail, ran on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。走勢尚可。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Jumped fairly gradually improved to 2L 4th, drifted slightly backward to 4L 6th in midfield onto first bend, renewed effort 500M out shifting 4-wide to challenge into straight, held place chance until swamped inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 出閘一般，逐漸推進至第四位，落後兩個馬位。開始轉首個彎位時略為墮居中間第六位，落後四個馬位。五百米處重新發力。入直路時移至第四疊以展開挑戰。保持入位機會直至最後二百米被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Settled in last few one off the rail, drifted backward rounding home bend, shifted wide for a run into straight, finished off the race well inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 居最後數位之內，走第二疊。轉直路彎時墮後。入直路時移出外疊取位。最後二百米衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped awkwardly losing ground travelling keenly in last few early, tightened between runners onto home bend, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, produced good late impression inside final 250M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘笨拙及失地，早段居最後數位之內，搶口。開始轉直路彎時在馬匹之間受緊迫。轉入直路時走內疊節省腳程。最後二百五十米追前頗多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (1W1W) Bounded on jumping and lost ground, raced behind midfield on the inside, travelled keenly in the early stages, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 250M, finished off well to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(1W1W) 躍出時向上跳躍及失地，居中間之後位置，走內疊。早段搶口，直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能望空，二百五十米處望空，末段衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W1W) Mid-field, had to wait for run briefly entering home straight headway between horses, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間位置。入直路時一度須等待空位出現，在馬匹之間追前。最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Raced behind midfield on the rail, made no ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W2W) Mid-field, unable to quicken under pressure 300m out, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W2W) 居中間位置。三百米處在催策下未能增速。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (3W2W) Sat at the back 3 wide, never in contention.
(Irregular heart rhythm.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(3W2W) 居後列，走第三疊。從未參與競逐。
（心律不正常。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Slow to jump, sat towards rear, no contention.
(Lost right hind plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 出閘緩慢，居後列。未有參與競逐。
（失去右後蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat last, picked off a few weakened rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居包尾位置。末段超越數匹已轉弱的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) From draw 1 given a patient ride in a rearward spot, had some work to do top of the straight, lacked a turn of foot and couldn't launch a serious challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘後居後列，留力候上。直路初仍落後甚遠。未能加速以展開真正挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W) Settled well behind and waited with, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, produced strong late finish between runners inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W) 遙居於後，留力候上。轉入直路時走內疊節省腳程。最後二百米在馬匹之間衝刺強勁。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W4W) Began only fairly and made contact, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, 4 lengths back turning in, showed no response early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，與對手互相觸碰，居中間稍後位置，走外疊。入直路時落後四個馬位。直路初對催策毫無反應，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Bumped start, raced 2 wide behind midfield, steadied near 800M, 6 to 7 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 起步時被碰撞，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。接近八百米處時收慢。入直路時落後六至七個馬位。直路上未能以勁勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Sat at the rear, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 居後列。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(-) (1W1W1W1W) Away well, sent forward to take the lead, challenged by rival from 600M, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 200M, weakened gradually close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(-)(1W1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。自六百米處起受對手挑戰，直路早段保持佳勢，二百米處未能再增速及被超越，接近終點時逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Shifted in at start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 起步時向內斜跑，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初保持佳勢。二百米處未能再增速。其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Began smartly from gate 13, raced prominently on the outside, there to turn, peaked on run 300M, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 自第十三檔出閘迅速，居前列，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。三百米處未能再增速，其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Made running, pressed in front, headed over 300m out, soon weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 帶頭競跑。在領放下受追迫。三百米處被超越。瞬即轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, well placed into home straight, unable to pick up for pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。入直路時居好位。末段在催策下未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Bounded as stalls opened and lost ground, raced in rear, forced to steady on heels 900m out, tight of room 350m out, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 開閘時向上跳躍及失地，居後列。九百米處被迫收慢避開對手的後蹄。三百五十米處空位不足。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Raced in touch with leaders, travelled smoothly to follow winner through 400m out, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。四百米處走勢暢順，跟隨頭馬推進。保持同速，未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(+) (1W1W1W1W) Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead to turn, peaked and headed 200M, stayed on evenly to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(+)(1W1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。直路彎前輕鬆領放。二百米處未能再增速及被超越。末段保持穩勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Chased leader after jumping from draw 13, briefly led early straight but soon couldn't keep up with pursuing rivals, faded to finish 6th.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 自第十三檔躍出後追趕領放馬。直路早段一度領先，但瞬即未能抗衡緊追的對手。力竭，取得第六名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Soon led from a poor draw, gradually shifted across for rails run over 1200M out, led until joined early in home straight, unable to sustain effort inside final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘，瞬即領放。千二米處逐漸切入內欄。領先至直路初被追及。最後一百米無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Made running, ridden over 200m out, closed down final 100m, headed on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 帶頭競跑。二百米處受催策。最後一百米被追近。過終點時被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(-) (1W1W1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, kept on but no threat to winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(-)(1W1W1W1W) 展現甚快前速，取得領先。保持走勢，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Began smartly from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened inside final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，受催策上前，取得領先。入直路時領先半個馬位。三百米處未能再增速，被超越。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Made running, headed 200m out, no extra final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 帶頭競跑。二百米處被超越。最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Broke well from the one draw niggling along early, gradually settled about 2L back in 3rd from over 800M out, obtained a clear run over 200M out but unable to quicken to threaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，早段受催策。自八百米處起逐漸居第三位，落後約兩個馬位。二百米處望空，但未能加速以構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began smartly from gate 12, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the first two final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第十二檔出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。直路彎前走勢良佳。直路上保持佳勢，但最後五十米未能抗衡頭兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W4W) Caught 3 wide near midfield, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W4W) 居接近中間位置，走第三疊。直路上轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Made running, challenged 300m out, saw off that rival after sustained battle, headed by winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 帶頭競跑。三百米處受挑戰。持續力拼，力拒對手。接近終點時被頭馬超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W1W) Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, headed 100M, weakened gradually close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先半個馬位。直路初保持佳勢。一百五十米處未能再加速。一百米處被超越。接近終點時逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Fast to jump, prominent one off the rail, kept finding plenty to the line when challenged by the late swooper.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居前列，走第二疊。末段受衝刺強勁的對手挑戰時保持勁勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W1W) Started well, made running, challenged final 150m, responded to pressure and just held on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W1W) 起步迅速，帶頭。最後一百五十米受挑戰。對催策交出反應，險勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Began moderately settling towards rear sharing 8th, shifted 3-wide with cover rounding home bend, swung wider into straight making short-lived efforts before finding no extra 150M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 出閘普通，並居後列的第八位。轉直路彎時移出第三疊，有遮擋。入直路時移出更外疊。一度發力上前，一百五十米處再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Settled in front of midfield, traveled nicely, responded nicely under whip, just missed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間之前位置，走勢良佳。在鞭策下反應良佳，僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat worse than midfield, made steady progress late (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間之後位置。末段穩步追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Led, weakened and faded in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 領放。直路上轉弱及力竭。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Made all on rail from the one draw setting a sound pace, hung on well under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘，全程沿欄以快步速領放。末段在催策下保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W2W1W1W) Virtually made all, obtained rails run on top of first bend about 1300M out setting a steady pace in back straight, quickened up the tempo in front rounding home bend, hung on well to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W2W1W1W) 一放到底。約千三米處進入首個彎位時移入內欄。對面直路上以平穩步速領放。轉直路彎時在領放下加快步速。保持佳勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Began fairly, ridden forward to 2L 3rd briefly 1050M out, drifted back to 3L 6th 3-wide 700M out, fought on steadily under pressure from 5th into straight, lost 3rd late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 出閘一般。受催策上前，一千零五十米處一度居第三位，落後兩個馬位。七百米處墮退至第六位，落後三個馬位，走第三疊。入直路時居第五位，其後在受催策下持續力拼，末段失去季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W) Ridden from a middle barrier to vie for lead early, gaining 1L 2nd 4-wide onto first bend, soon came to tackle leader in home straight and hit the front 300M out only to be outsprinted 150M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W) 自中檔出閘後受催策，早段爭奪領先。開始轉首個彎位時進佔第二位，落後一個馬位，走第四疊。直路上瞬即上前挑戰領放馬。三百米處取得領先，僅於一百五十米處被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped with them, sent forward to race in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, kept on well in straight to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，受催策上前，居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W1W) Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/4L behind the leader on rail, easy run to turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead 150M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
(Sustained a small wound to the right hind leg.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Sustained a small wound to the right hind leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，落後領放馬一又四分一個馬位，走內欄。直路彎前走勢輕鬆。直路上對催策反應良佳。一百五十米處取得領先。末段保持佳勢，但接近終點時未能抗衡頭馬。
（右後腿有一個細小傷口。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Jumped well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, blundered near 850M, angled out 450M, kept on well in straight to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。接近八百五十米處時失蹄。四百五十米處向外移出。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W) Prominent briefly from a wide barrier but soon taken well back approaching first bend, produced good impression under pressure in home straight, made no further impression inside the 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W) 自外檔出閘，一度居前列，但趨近首個彎位時瞬即留後，遙居後列。直路上在催策下追前甚多。一百米處再無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(-) Tracked leaders towards centre of course, under pressure 400m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(-)跟隨領先馬匹，靠近跑道中央競跑。四百米處受催策。保持走勢，但速度不足以追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Soon took up running on rail after moderate start, led until headed shortly after straightening, folded up quickly inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘普通，瞬即取得領先，走內欄。領放，直至入直路後不久被超越。最後二百米迅速力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (5W3W) Tracked leading pair, challenged briefly 300m out, no extra final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(5W3W) 跟隨領先兩駒。三百米處一度展開挑戰。最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Began well from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length turning in, kept on well in straight to hold off the challenger.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先一個馬位。直路上保持佳勢，力拒對手的挑戰，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W1W) Began from the middle draw to make all, taking advantage of the slow early tempo to obtain rails run over 800M out, driven over 2L clear briefly inside the 150M, won cozily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W1W) 自中檔出閘，一放到底。利用賽事早段慢步速的優勢，八百米處佔取內欄位置。受催策，一百五十米處一度帶離逾兩個馬位。從容取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Chased leader, every chance 300m out, faded final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 追趕領放馬。三百米處一度甚具爭勝機會。最後二百米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, ridden top of home straight, headed by winner 200m out, sticking to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 展現甚快前速以領放。直路初受催策。二百米處被頭馬超越。持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Jumped well and led, kept on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，領放。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Fast into stride, raced prominently on the stands' rail, hard ridden from 400M but only showed limited response, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;出閘迅速，居前列，走外欄。自四百米處起受力策，但反應僅屬平平。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Fast into stride, sent forward to take the lead, peaked 300M, headed 250M, weakened gradually final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。三百米處未能再增速。二百五十米處被超越。最後一百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped well from gate 1, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 500M, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;自第一檔出閘迅速，受催策上前，居前列。五百米處取得領先。三百米處未能再增速，被超越。最後一百米轉弱。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Capitalist from Miss Admiration, a daughter of Sebring. Horses by the same sire include Sunlight Power and Superb Capitalist. This fellow was given five trials in Hong Kong. In the latest trial, he sat last and finished fifth under the whip, beaten by 6-1/4Ls, over 1200m AWT at Sha Tin on June 23. He's not looking like a first-up winner here.
formguide.comments_chi: 「巨富」(Capitalist)之後，在港同父馬包括「陽光勇士」及「八駿巨昇」等駒，生母出自「識奔」(Sebring)。抵港後試閘五次。最近6月23日出試田泥1200米，早段居後，末段鞭策下跑第五名，落後頭馬6.25個馬位。初出未能構成威脅。

formguide.comments_eng: Irish ISG, a 4-year-old gelding, by Invincible Spirit from Jakonda, a daughter of Kingmambo. Horses by the same sire include Kolachi and Circuit Blazing. He is a half-brother to Full Power. This fellow was given three trials in Hong Kong for one win. In the latest trial, he shared the lead and won under slight pressure, by 1/2L, over 1200m AWT at Sha Tin on June 23. He looks a nice horse and could run well here on debut.
formguide.comments_chi: 「志氣高」(Invincible Spirit)之後，在港同父馬包括「至高心得」及「綫路通明」等駒，生母出自Kingmambo。與「福善」為半兄弟馬。抵港後三次試閘得一勝。最近6月23日出試田泥1200米，早段並頭領放，末段稍騎下以半個馬位之先勝出。潛質不俗，初出預計會有良好走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat on pace, traveled okay, made good progress when asked near 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居前列，走勢尚可。接近一百五十米處時在催策下追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W5W) Gradually taken back to last few after beginning from a wide barrier, one of the widest into home straight, inconvenienced for a stride just inside the 300M, ran home one-paced.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W5W) 自外檔出閘，逐漸留居最後數位之內。入直路時走最外疊。三百米處一度受妨礙。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W) Caught 3 wide no cover behind midfield, weakened in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路上轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W2W) Out with rest, raced 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened inside final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W2W) 與對手同步躍出，落後約兩個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初未能再增速。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W) Sat towards the rear 2 wide, made no ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W) 居後列，走第二疊。末段未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W) Settled midfield 2 wide, made no ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W1W3W) Crowded start, raced at rear on the inside, angled out after passing 500M, 9 lengths or so back turning in, passed some tired runners in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W1W3W) 起步時受擠迫，居後列，走內疊。跑過五百米處後向外移出。入直路時落後約九個馬位。直路上超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) Sat midfield 2 wide, never impress.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W) Sat rear, raced rear, made steady ground late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W) 沿途居後列。末段穩步上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Caught 3 wide no cover on pace, gave ground in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居前列，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路上墮退。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W4W) Taken back from gate 13, raced at rear on the outside, there to turn, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W4W) 自第十三檔出閘，留居後列，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Sat on pace on the rail, gave ground final 200M. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬，走內欄。最後二百米墮退。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Bumped shortly after start, raced in midfield, 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back turning in, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 起步後不久被碰撞，居中間位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後約四個馬位。衝刺平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W4W) Shifted out at start and made heavy contact, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, very wide turning in, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W4W) 起步時向外斜跑，與對手互相大力觸碰，居中間之後位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。入直路時走大外疊。直路初對催策反應平平。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Settled handy, gave ground rounding the Turn, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居前列。轉直路彎時墮退。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Sat midfield 3 wide, gave ground in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。直路上墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) In touch with leaders, pushed along 300m out, one paced.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹。三百米處受推策，保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Began well from gate 13, positioned a length behind the leader on the stands' side, no clear run until final 50M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;自第十三檔出閘迅速，落後領放馬一個馬位，走外欄。未能望空直至五十米處。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Settled in last few 3-wide with cover, widest runner turning in for home, ran on steadily under pressure down the centre of the straight, never nearer.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居最後數位之內，走第三疊，有遮擋。轉入直路時走最外疊。直路上受催策，在跑道中央以穩勢上前。以末段最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W3W) Mid-division, three wide, pushed along halfway and struggling to hold position, soon weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。半程時受推策，難以保持位置，瞬即轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) Prominent early, caught behind weakening runner from halfway and shuffled back to rear by top of home straight, no impression under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 早段居前列。自半程起在轉弱的對手之後受困，直路初前墮居後列。在催策下毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W3W) Settled in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, stayed on but unable to get on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W3W) 居中間之後位置。入直路時受推策，走外疊。保持走勢，但未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (4W3W4W) Held up, pushed along 300m out and no impression, never out of rear.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(4W3W4W) 留後。三百米處受推策，毫無表現。從未超越後列。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Settled in front of midfield, weakened gradually, no impression made.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間之前位置。逐漸轉弱。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Sat in front of midfield on the rail, weakened and faded in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。直路上轉弱及力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W1W1W) Soon led and set well controlled pace to the straight, quickened up nicely passing 300M before keeping on well final stages to hold pursuing rivals at bay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W1W1W) 瞬即取得領先。直路前以穩定步速領放。跑過三百米處時加速良佳。末段保持佳勢，力拒緊追的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Dropped out from wide draw, headway up rail early stages, checked 700m out, never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。早段沿欄上前。七百米處勒避。從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W2W) Well there 3-wide, gained outright 2nd some1L back 900M out, lost position into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W2W) 居好位，走第三疊。九百米處進佔第二位，落後約一個馬位。入直路時失位。持續力拼，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W) Soon in front setting steady pace, kept on well under pressure final 300M and gamely held on from pursuing rivals late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W) 瞬即取得領先，以平穩步速領放。最後三百米在催策下保持佳勢。末段力拒緊追的對手掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W3W3W) Became unbalanced at the start, ended up 6Ls back towards the rear of the main group, made good progress in the straight finishing off final 200M fastest. (Jockey reprimanded for failing to ride out to the end of the race.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W3W3W) 起步時失去平衡，居主馬群後列，落後六個馬位。直路上追前甚多，最後二百米衝刺最快。（騎師因未有力策坐騎至終點而被譴責。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (6W2W2W) Chased leader, ridden to lead 200m out, soon asserted and ran on strongly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(6W2W2W) 追趕領放馬。受催策，二百米處取得領先，瞬即控制大局，走勢強勁。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Began well from gate 1, raced towards rear on the middle track, passed some tired runners final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;自第一檔出閘迅速，居後列，在跑道中央競跑。最後四百米超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (5W1W1W) Pressed forward, emerged as leader 850M setting good pace to straight, headed by winner near 250M, faded late to finish 6th.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(5W1W1W) 受催策上前，八百五十米處取得領先。直路前以中等步速領放。接近二百五十米處時被頭馬超越，末段力竭，取得第六名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W3W) Up with leaders early stages before settling down in a trailing position just off the pace, kept on one paced under top weight on straightening, always held by leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W3W) 早段跟上領先馬匹，其後居領放馬稍後有遮擋的位置。入直路時在負頂磅下保持同速，一直落後領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Jumped well from gate 12, sent forward to race prominently on the outside, 1-1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 自第十二檔出閘迅速，受催策上前，居前列，走外疊。入直路時落後一個半馬位。直路初未能再增速，其後逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Crowded at start, made running, race keenly throughout, headed by winner 200m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步時受擠迫，帶頭競跑。沿途搶口。二百米處被頭馬超越。持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W5W) Taken back from the widest draw to travel 3-wide without cover towards rear in 8th, widest turning in for home, ran on under pressure down the centre of the track to be nearest at finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W5W) 自大外檔出閘，留居後列第八位，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。轉入直路時走最外疊。末段在跑道中央受催策上前，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Waited with towards rear, briefly hampered 500m out, lost touch in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居後列，留力候上。五百米處一度受阻礙。直路上被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生碰撞，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先一個半馬位。直路上保持佳勢，但終點線上不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W3W) Pressed forward from a wide barrier settling 3-wide without cover in 5th some 3L off the pace, gradually faded under pressure in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W3W) 自外檔出閘，受催策上前，居第五位，落後領放馬約三個馬位，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路上在催策下逐漸力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W) Away in line, went forward chasing leaders, raced keenly early and middle stages, couldn't keep up with the pace passing 250M, faded towards the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，上前追趕領先馬匹，早段及中段搶口。跑過二百五十米處時未能跟上步速。末段力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W2W) Ridden from stalls to track leader, quickened early to lead top of home straight, headed by winner 150m out, just held second.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W2W) 出閘後受催策，跟隨領放馬。直路初率先加速，取得領先。一百五十米處被頭馬超越。僅保住亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Jumped well, raced better than midfield on the outside, 4 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走外疊。入直路時落後四個馬位。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W) Jumped well and led, kept on until weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，帶頭領放。保持走勢，直至最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W2W2W) From wide draw went forward to race outside the lead, no extra passing 250M, weakened towards the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W2W2W) 自大外檔出閘後上前，居領放馬外側。跑過二百五十米處時再無餘力。末段轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (3W1W1W) Bumped leaving stalls, across from widest draw to lead, headed top of home straight, gave ground final 200m.
(Lame in right front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(3W1W1W) 自最外檔出閘時被碰撞，切入內疊領放。直路初被超越。最後二百米墮退。
（右前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Made contact at start, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked on run 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步時與對手互相觸碰，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初保持佳勢。一百米處未能再增速。末段走勢平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Jumped awkwardly, ridden along to lead, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 出閘笨拙，在催策下領放。末段走勢平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Soon recovered from moderate start to just over 3L back in 6th on rail, gained 5th in a similar rail position on home bend about 750M out, not much room in straight until over 300M out, quickened well to take charge at the 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘普通，瞬即恢復走勢，居第六位，落後稍逾三個馬位，走內欄。約七百五十米處於直路彎進佔第五位，居相若位置，仍走內欄。直路上空位不足直至三百米處。以佳勢加速，一百五十米處取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Away with them, tracked leaders on the inside, 2 lengths or so back turning in, showed good response in straight, took the lead 50M, kept on well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 與對手同步躍出，跟隨領先馬匹，走內疊。入直路時落後約兩個馬位。直路上對催策反應良佳，五十米處取得領先。保持佳勢至終點，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Began only fairly, raced slightly behind midfield on the outside, there to turn, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間稍後位置，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上略為追前。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PP, a 3-year-old gelding, by Snitzel from Warranty, a daughter of All Too Hard. Horses by the same sire include Gummy Gummy and Nebraskan. This fellow had seven starts in Australia for one placing (a 2yo handicap over 1000m). He was given three trials in Hong Kong for two wins and one placing. He raced handily and won under a hold, by 2-1/4Ls, over 1200m on turf in Conghua on June 8. In the latest trial, he raced handily and won under slight pressure, by a nose, over 1200m AWT at Sha Tin on June 23. He looks a nice horse and could run well here on debut.
formguide.comments_chi: 「犀利時」(Snitzel)之後，在港同父馬包括「晶晶日上」及「獵寶勤」等駒，生母出自「情深義重」(All Too Hard)。來港前於澳洲七次出賽一次上名，該場為1000米兩歲讓磅賽。抵港後試閘三次得兩勝一位。6月8日出試從化草地1200米，早段跟前，末段按韁下以2.25個馬位之先勝出。最近6月23日出試田泥1200米，早段跟前，末段稍騎下以一馬鼻位之先勝出。潛質不俗，初出預計會有良好走勢。

formguide.comments_eng: New Zealand PP, a 3-year-old gelding, by Per Incanto from She's Apples, a daughter of Redoute's Choice. Horses by the same sire include Raging Blizzard and A Americ Te Specso. This fellow had three starts in Australia for one win (a maiden handicap over 1200m). He was given four trials in Hong Kong for two placings. He shared the lead and finished second under pressure, beaten by a neck, over 1000m on turf in Conghua on April 17. In the latest trial, he sat not far behind the pace and finished third under pressure, beaten by 1-1/4Ls, over 1200m AWT at Sha Tin on June 23. Prefer to take a watching brief to see how he shapes at his local debut.
formguide.comments_chi: Per Incanto之後，在港同父馬包括「精算暴雪」及「有財有勢」等駒，生母出自「利得精選」(Redoute's Choice)。來港前於澳洲三戰得一勝，勝出一場為1200米從未勝出馬讓磅賽。抵港後四次試閘兩次上名。4月17日出試從化草地1000米，早段並頭領放，末段力策下跑第二名，落後頭馬一馬頸位。最近6月23日出試田泥1200米，早段落後領先馬匹不遠，末段力策下跑第三名，落後頭馬1.25個馬位。初出暫宜觀望。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Prominent early before niggling along in midfield in 7th on rail, inconvenienced just inside the 600M, saved ground turning in for home but had no more to give in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 早段居前列，其後受催策，居中間第七位，走內欄。跑過六百米處後受妨礙。轉入直路時走內欄節省腳程，但直路上再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W2W2W2W) Settled in front of midfield, gave ground notably near the 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W2W2W2W) 居中間之前位置。接近一百五十米處時顯著墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Unable to hold a more forward position despite ridden along, raced in midfield and disadvantaged by the riderless horse on the turn, failed to run on in the straight. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 儘管受催策，但未能佔取更為靠前的位置。居中間位置，直路彎受鞍上無人的馬匹干擾。直路上未能追前。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W) Settled just off the pace on rail mainly in 3rd, drifted some 6L off the lead at the stage when pace quickened on the bend, came to challenge from 3L back into straight and gained upper hand about 50M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W) 緊隨領放馬，大多居第三位，走內欄。直路彎步速加快時落後領放馬約六個馬位。入直路時落後三個馬位，自該位置起展開挑戰。約五十米處佔得上風。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(+) (3W2W2W) Began well from a wide draw, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, a length back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(+)(3W2W2W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，居第二位，走第二疊。入直路時落後一個馬位。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Fast away, led early stages before taking up a trailing spot behind leader, fought on steadily turning home to finish a creditable 4th.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘迅速。早段領放，其後居領放馬之後，有遮擋。轉直路彎時持續力拼，取得不俗的第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W3W3W) Pressed forward from a poor draw reaching within 1L of pace 3-wide in 4th briefly early in back straight, drifted 2L back to joint 4th in middle stages, fought on steadily without threatening in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W3W3W) 自外檔出閘，受催策上前。對面直路早段一度居第四位，落後領放馬不逾一個馬位，走第三疊。中段墮後兩個馬位，居並排第四位。直路上持續力拼，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Raced very wide throughout in rear of mid-field, some headway on bend, forced to steady 100m out, unable to recover.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 居中間之後位置，沿途走大外疊。直路彎略為追前。一百米處被迫收慢，其後未能恢復走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W2W) Settled handy, traveled smoothly, responded nicely under whip.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W2W) 居前列，走勢暢順。對鞭策反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Blundered at the Start, sat rear, badly held up in the Straight until 100M (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 起步時失蹄，居後列。直路上嚴重受困直至一百米處。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 3 lengths behind the leader on the inside, same margin back on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，落後領放馬三個馬位，走內疊。直路彎落後相同距離。直路初向外移出。以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W4W) Badly crowded and checked shortly after start, shuffled back, pushed along widest into home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W4W) 起步後不久嚴重受擠迫及勒避，墮後。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。毫無表現。
