runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Away with them, raced towards rear on the inside, steadied off heels near 650M, 2 wide from 600M, very wide into straight, made contact early in straight, failed to make any progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 與對手同步出閘，居後列，走內疊。接近六百五十米處時收慢避開他駒後蹄。自六百米處起走第二疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路初與對手互相觸碰。其後未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W3W) Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W3W) 起步後不久與對手互相碰撞，落後約四個馬位，居第二疊。直路彎落後相同距離。直路初未能再加速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Shifted out and heavily bumped leaving stalls, held up last, still in last place top of home straight, passed a few tiring rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 出閘時向外斜跑，發生大力碰撞。留居包尾位置。直路初仍居包尾位置，末段超越數匹漸呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Average to begin, raced behind midfield on the inside, 3 lengths back turning in, no clear run early in straight, made some progress after passing 300M, not enough room inside final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘普通，居中間之後位置，走內疊。入直路時落後三個馬位。直路初未能望空。跑過三百米處後略為追前。最後一百米空位不足。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W4W) Began only fairly, raced behind midfield, 2 wide, a bit closer in the middle stages, angled out 550M, 3 lengths or so back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。中段略為追近。五百五十米處向外移出。入直路時落後約三個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Bumped start, raced behind midfield on the inside, angled out after passing 500M, 4 lengths back turning in, no daylight early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off very strongly to score. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 起步時發生碰撞，居中間之後位置，走內疊。跑過五百米處後向外移出。入直路時落後四個馬位。直路早段未能望空。一百五十米處望空。衝刺凌厲，勝出賽事。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Slotted into a 3-wide spot in midfield, travelled satisfactorily in the early stages but did not finish the race off on straightening. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。早段走勢令人滿意。入直路時未能以勁勢衝刺。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Sat towards the rear, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 居後列。走勢平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Jumped only fairly, settled in front of midfield on the rail, raced greenly in the early stages, ran on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之前位置，走內欄。直路初走勢稚嫩。其後走勢尚可。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W) Tracked pace out wide without cover early stages, improved to track leaders two wide with cover 600m out, effort 400m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W) 早段跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。六百米處推進以跟隨領先馬匹，走第二疊，有遮擋。四百米處發力，持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (4W4W) Caught wide no cover chasing leaders, had no extra final 200M and weakened out of contention. (Jockey - obliged to make use early stages to hold a forward position.)
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(4W4W) 追趕領先馬匹，走外疊，沒有遮擋。最後二百米再無餘力，轉弱，再無爭逐機會。（騎師表示，他須於早段催策坐騎以佔取前列位置。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Moderately away from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently, 3 wide, there to turn, kept on very well in straight, always just held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 自外檔出閘普通，受催策上前，居前列，走第三疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上保持甚佳走勢，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W) Wide early, improved to track leaders out wide without cover 800m out, effort 400m out, weakened final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W) 早段走外疊。推進以跟隨領先馬匹，八百米處走外疊，沒有遮擋。四百米處發力。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, 2 wide after passing 600M, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走內疊。跑過六百米處後走第二疊，入直路時落後一至兩個馬位。衝刺強勁，跑獲亞軍，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat on pace 2 wide, ran on well when asked, won going away, smartly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居前列，走第二疊。在催策下走勢良佳，帶離對手，以佳勢取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W) Made contact with the left side of its barrier on jumping, raced behind midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer after passing 900M, raced slightly better than midfield on outer in the middle stages, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W) 躍出時觸碰閘廂左側，居中間之後位置，走外疊。跑過九百米處後略為追近。中段居中間稍前位置，走外疊。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Box seat, well placed into home straight, pressed on 300m out, ran on strongly to lead 200m out, won going away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 居包廂位置。入直路時居好位。三百米處受催策。二百米處衝刺強勁，取得領先。帶離勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Out with rest, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, commenced move 550M, 1-1/2L back turning in, kept on well in straight to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。五百五十米處開始發力。入直路時落後一個半馬位。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Tracked leaders, switched for clear run 500m out, quickened early to lead 250m out, headed by winner 100m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。五百米處轉換跑線以望空。直路早段加速，二百五十米處取得領先。一百米處被頭馬超越，持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W5W) Began only fairly, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 wide from 800M, angled out 500M, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W5W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置，走第二疊。自八百米處起走第三疊。五百米處向外移出，直路早段對催策反應平平。最後二百米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W) Raced wide, improved to lead 1200m out, soon headed by rival top of home straight, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W) 走外疊。千二米處上前領放。直路初瞬即被對手超越。最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Settled in mid-field, keen throughout, had to wait for run into home straight, bumped 350m out, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置，沿途搶口。入直路時須等待空位出現，三百五十米處發生碰撞。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W) Shifted in and heavily bumped out of stalls, waited with towards rear, under pressure 700m out, made up some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W) 出閘時向內斜跑，發生大力碰撞。居後列，留力候上。七百米處受催策，末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W5W) Reserved in a rearward spot 6-7Ls off leader in a genuinely run race, pushed along 500M, ran home well enough but had too much to make up on leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W5W) 留居後列，落後領放馬六至七個馬位，賽事步速偏快。五百米處受推策，末段衝刺良佳，但已落後領先馬匹甚遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W) Settled in rear of mid-field, driven middle stages, switched for clear run top of home straight, unable to improve position.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W) 居中間之後位置。中段受催策。直路初轉換跑線以望空。未能推進。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Waited with towards rear, ridden top of home straight, ran on well final 200m, beaten only narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 居後列，留力候上。直路初受催策。最後二百米走勢良佳，僅以短距離之差落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W4W) Unable to slot in from draw 7, caught racing wide no cover behind midfield, responded mildly to pressure passing 300M, stayed on without posing serious threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W4W) 自第七檔出閘後未能切入內疊，居中間之後位置，走外疊，沒有遮擋。跑過三百米處時對催策反應普通。末段保持走勢，未能對領先馬匹構成真正威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W2W3W) Settled in mid-field, briefly impeded 1100m out, angled wide for clear run into home straight, strong run to lead final 50m, won comfortably.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W2W3W) 居中間位置。千一米處一度受阻礙。入直路時向外移出以望空。走勢強勁，五十米處取得領先。從容勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Commenced well, raced 3 wide slightly better than midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, showed some response early in straight, unbalanced and blundered near 200M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 出閘迅速，居中間稍前位置，走第三疊。大部分途程沒有遮擋。直路初對催策略為交出反應。接近二百米處時失去平衡及失蹄。保持穩勢至終點。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 7 lengths back, made good progress after turning in, blocked final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 自外檔出閘後留居包尾位置，落後七個馬位。入直路後追前甚多，最後五十米受困。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Crowded start, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 起步時受擠迫，居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat at the rear on the rail, no clear run in the Straight, never tested.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。直路上未能望空。從未能施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Sat in front of midfield on the rail, held up and never tested.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。末段受困。從未能施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W2W) Slowly away, rail position in rear of mid-field, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, eased when detached 200m out.
(Bled.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘緩慢，居中間之後位置，走內欄。自四百米處起在催策下未能加速。二百米處被拋離時收慢。
（流鼻血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Awkward start, settled in mid-field, short of room early in home straight, passed a few tiring rivals late on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 出閘笨拙，居中間位置。直路早段空位不足。末段超越數匹漸呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Caught racing wide no cover in a position towards the rear, didn't respond to riding and soon left behind turning into straight. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 居後列，走外疊，沒有遮擋。入直路時對催策毫無反應，瞬即被拋離。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Taken back to race 2 wide at rear, 6 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made very good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 留居包尾位置，落後約六個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎落後相同距離。直路上追前甚多，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Began well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, wider turning in, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。入直路時走更外疊。直路上毫無表現。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (1W1W1W1W) From draw 2 stayed close to the pace early on before drifting back to race in midfield middle stages, ran home well final 300M for 3rd beaten only 0.5L.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(1W1W1W1W) 自第二檔出閘，早段居接近領放馬的位置。中段墮居中間位置。最後三百米衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍，僅負半個馬位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (2W5W) Settled in rear of mid-field, good headway on bend, switched widest into home straight, ran on strongly final 300m, just failed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(2W5W) 居中間之後位置。直路彎以佳勢上前。入直路時移出最外疊。最後三百米走勢強勁，僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, followed winner through 200m out, ran on well and beaten only narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W1W1W) 沿欄居中間位置。入直路時須等待空位出現。二百米處跟隨頭馬上前。走勢良佳，僅負短距離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (2W3W) Settled well behind and waited with, baulked for a run early in straight until over 250M out, quickened well to snatch victory final strides.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(2W3W) 遙居後列，留力候上。直路早段受困至二百五十米處。末段加速良佳，最後數步取得勝利。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W3W) Settled in mid-field, struggled to hold position final bend, eased once well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W3W) 居中間位置。直路彎難以保持位置。落後甚遠時隨即收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Settled towards rear, saved ground on the inside turning in for home, ran on in straight, never nearer.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 居後列。入直路時走內疊節省腳程。直路上追前，以末段最為接近。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PP, a 3-year-old gelding, by Snitzel from Presque Isle, a daughter of Zenno Rob Roy. Horses by the same sire include Gummy Gummy and Nebraskan. This fellow had four starts in Australia for one win (a 3yo+ maiden over 1600m) and two placings. He was given five trials in Hong Kong for one placing. In the latest trial, he sat not far behind the pace and finished third under pressure, beaten by 3/4L, over 1200m AWT at Sha Tin on June 25. Prefer to take a watching brief to see how he shapes at his local debut.
formguide.comments_chi: 「犀利時」(Snitzel)之後，在港同父馬包括「晶晶日上」及「獵寶勤」等駒，生母出自「荒漠英雄」(Zenno Rob Roy)。來港前於澳洲四戰得一勝兩位，勝出一場為1600米三歲及以上從未勝出馬賽。抵港後五次試閘一次上名。最近6月25日出試田泥1200米，早段落後領先馬匹不遠，末段力策下跑第三名，落後頭馬0.75個馬位。初出暫宜觀望。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W3W) Blundered badly on jumping with jockey becoming unbalanced and the horse losing ground, settled near rear throughout and couldn't go on turning into the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W3W) 躍出時嚴重失蹄，導致騎師失去平衡，失地。沿途居後列。轉入直路時無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W2W3W) Bumped and became unbalanced at the start, settled towards the rear 6Ls away, wide into the straight but couldn't finish off when asked. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W2W3W) 起步時發生碰撞及失去平衡，居後列，落後六個馬位。入直路時走外疊，但在催策下衝刺乏力。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (2W1W2W) Bumped heavily shortly after start, raced towards rear on the inside, moved a bit closer on turn, angled out 400M, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Lame in right front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(2W1W2W) 起步後不久被大力碰撞，居後列，走內疊。直路彎略為追近。四百米處向外移出。衝刺平穩。（見競賽事件報告。）
（右前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W4W) Travelled 3-wide in midfield, commenced move entering home straight, unable to quicken under pressure and made no further impression inside final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。入直路時開始上前。最後二百米在催策下未能增速，再無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W4W) Wide in mid-field, keen 800m out, headway out wide on bend, sustained headway to challenge top of home straight, no extra final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W4W) 居中間位置，走外疊。八百米處搶口。直路彎上前，走外疊。直路初持續上前以展開挑戰。最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W3W) Always prominent chasing leaders, nudged along 500M and moved up to 2nd 250M, run ended late stages then weakened to finish 6th.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W3W) 一直居前列，追趕領先馬匹。五百米處受催策，二百五十米處進佔第二位。末段無以為繼，轉弱，以第六名過終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Crowded and bumped leaving stalls, raced in rear, still in rear top of home straight, briefly hampered 200m out, unable to recover.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 出閘時受擠迫及發生碰撞，居後列。直路初仍居後列。二百米處一度受阻礙，未能恢復走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W3W) Bumped out of stalls, mid division, had to wait for run top of home straight, driven 300m out, ran on well final 200m to close on winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W3W) 出閘時發生碰撞，居中間位置。直路初須等待空位出現。三百米處受催策。最後二百米以佳勢上前，追近頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, challenged leaders 600m out, quickened early to lead top of home straight, headed 100m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。六百米處挑戰領先馬匹。直路初加速，取得領先。一百米處被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Bumped after the start, restrained at the rear and caught wide no cover throughout, made only limited progress in the straight and was never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 起步後發生碰撞，受約束。沿途居後列，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路上僅能略為追前。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow(-) (2W3W) Settled in midfield, baulked for a run in home straight until over 250M out, ran on well under pressure to hit the front 150M out and soon drew clear.
(Jockey dropped right rein for a number of strides at 200M.)
runnerrecords.incident_eng: (Jockey dropped right rein for a number of strides at 200M.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速(-)(2W3W) 居中間位置。直路上受困直至二百五十米處。在催策下走勢良佳，一百五十米處取得領先，瞬即帶離對手勝出。
（於二百米騎師在數步之間右邊韁繩脫手。）
runnerrecords.incident_chi: （於二百米騎師在數步之間右邊韁繩脫手。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Mainly in midfield, tight between runners early in straight and checked 280M out, steadied again 180M out, made no further impression in closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 大多居中間位置。直路初在馬匹之間緊迫競跑，二百八十米處勒避。一百八十米處再度收慢。末段再無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W5W) Sat behind midfield 4 wide no cover, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W5W) 居中間之後位置，走第四疊，沒有遮擋。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Settled in mid-field, under pressure to hold position from 800m out, dropped away quickly in home straight, well beaten.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置。自八百米處起受催策以保持位置。直路上迅速墮退，洩氣潰敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W1W2W) Held up last, still in last place top of home straight, switched inside for clear run 200m out, never going pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W1W2W) 留居包尾位置。直路初仍居包尾位置。二百米處移入內疊以望空。從未能加速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, found rail 550M, no daylight early in straight, made minor progress after passing 250M, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間稍後位置，走第二疊。五百五十米處移入內欄。直路早段未能望空。跑過二百五十米處後略為追前。一百米處未能再增速，保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Bumped exiting stalls, mid division, pushed along wide 500m out, short-lived challenge top of home straight, stayed on for pressure final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 出閘時發生碰撞，居中間位置。五百米處受推策，走外疊。直路初一度發力挑戰。二百米處在催策下保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W3W) Settled in mid-field, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out, gave ground final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置。自四百米處起受催策，但未能加速。最後三百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W) Raced very wide throughout in rear, shuffled back 400m out, lost touch final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W) 沿途居後列，走大外疊。四百米處墮後。最後三百米被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W1W) From draw 3 dropped back to race near last, kept to inside throughout, closed off quite well to go 2nd close home without troubling the winner. (Jockey fined for returning 3 lbs overweight.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W1W) 自第三檔出閘，墮後至接近包尾位置。沿途走內疊。末段衝刺頗佳，接近終點時進佔第二位，但未能威脅頭馬。（騎師因返回覆磅時超磅三磅而被罰款。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Dropped out from wide draw, unable to secure clear run until final 100m, not fully extended.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。未能望空直至一百米處。未能全力施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Showed no early pace and settled to be the last few on the rail, briefly held up in the last 100M, travelled strongly to the line, did not disgrace at all.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 欠缺前速，居最後數位之內，走內欄。最後一百米一度受困。以勁勢衝刺至終點。表現不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W3W) Three wide in mid-field without cover, driven 400m out to chase leaders, unable to get on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。四百米處在催策下追趕領先馬匹。未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Dropped out from widest draw, held up last, some headway on bend, clear run 150m out, ran on strongly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 自最外檔出閘後墮後，留居包尾位置。直路彎略為追前。一百五十米處望空，以勁勢上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (3W2W3W) Waited with towards rear, pushed along wide into home straight, hung in 150m out, ran on well to move into second close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(3W2W3W) 居後列，留力候上。入直路時受推策，走外疊。一百五十米處內閃。走勢良佳，接近終點時進佔第二位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W) Jumped only fairly, chased leaders on inside, quickened up well early straight to challenge leader, tried hard but was held over final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，追趕領先馬匹，走內疊。直路初以佳勢加速，挑戰領放馬。末段力拼，但未能追上。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Raced in rear, driven along and outpaced from 700m out, eased once well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居後列。自七百米處起受催策，但未能跟上步速。遙遙落後時隨即收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W) Three wide in mid-field without cover, unable to hold position halfway, eased once well held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。半程時未能保持位置。遙遙落後時隨即收慢。
